60#define UPDATE_TIMER 50
61#define DEFAULT_LAT 38.965767f
62#define DEFAULT_LON -120.083923f
63#define SET_HOME_TERRAIN_ALT_MAX 10000
64#define SET_HOME_TERRAIN_ALT_MIN -500

66// After a second GCS has requested control and we have given it permission to takeover, we will remove takeover permission automatically after this timeout
67// If the second GCS didn't get control
68#define REQUEST_OPERATOR_CONTROL_ALLOW_TAKEOVER_TIMEOUT_MSECS 10000

70const QString guided_mode_not_supported_by_vehicle = QObject::tr("Guided mode not supported by Vehicle.");

72// Standard connected vehicle
73Vehicle::Vehicle(LinkInterface* link,
74 int vehicleId,
75 int defaultComponentId,
76 MAV_AUTOPILOT firmwareType,
77 MAV_TYPE vehicleType,
78 QObject* parent)
79 : VehicleFactGroup (parent)
80 , _systemID (vehicleId)
81 , _defaultComponentId (defaultComponentId)
82 , _firmwareType (firmwareType)
83 , _vehicleType (vehicleType)
84 , _defaultCruiseSpeed (SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingCruiseSpeed()->rawValue().toDouble())
85 , _defaultHoverSpeed (SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingHoverSpeed()->rawValue().toDouble())
86 , _trajectoryPoints (new TrajectoryPoints(this, this))
87 , _mavlinkStreamConfig (std::bind(&Vehicle::_setMessageInterval, this, std::placeholders::_1, std::placeholders::_2))
88 , _vehicleFactGroup (this)
89 , _gpsFactGroup (this)
90 , _gps2FactGroup (this)
91 , _gpsAggregateFactGroup (this)
92 , _windFactGroup (this)
93 , _vibrationFactGroup (this)
94 , _temperatureFactGroup (this)
95 , _clockFactGroup (this)
96 , _setpointFactGroup (this)
97 , _distanceSensorFactGroup (this)
98 , _localPositionFactGroup (this)
99 , _localPositionSetpointFactGroup(this)
100 , _estimatorStatusFactGroup (this)
101 , _hygrometerFactGroup (this)
102 , _generatorFactGroup (this)
103 , _efiFactGroup (this)
104 , _rpmFactGroup (this)
105 , _terrainFactGroup (this)
106 , _terrainProtocolHandler (new TerrainProtocolHandler(this, &_terrainFactGroup, this))
107{
108 connect(MultiVehicleManager::instance(), &MultiVehicleManager::activeVehicleChanged, this, &Vehicle::_activeVehicleChanged);
109
110 connect(MAVLinkProtocol::instance(), &MAVLinkProtocol::messageReceived, this, &Vehicle::_mavlinkMessageReceived);
111 connect(MAVLinkProtocol::instance(), &MAVLinkProtocol::mavlinkMessageStatus, this, &Vehicle::_mavlinkMessageStatus);
112
113 connect(this, &Vehicle::flightModeChanged, this, &Vehicle::_handleFlightModeChanged);
114 connect(this, &Vehicle::armedChanged, this, &Vehicle::_announceArmedChanged);
115 connect(this, &Vehicle::flyingChanged, this, [this](bool flying){
116 if (flying) {
117 setInitialGCSPressure(QGCDeviceInfo::QGCPressure::instance()->pressure());
118 setInitialGCSTemperature(QGCDeviceInfo::QGCPressure::instance()->temperature());
119 }
120 });
121
122 connect(MultiVehicleManager::instance(), &MultiVehicleManager::parameterReadyVehicleAvailableChanged, this, &Vehicle::_vehicleParamLoaded);
123
124 connect(this, &Vehicle::remoteControlRSSIChanged, this, &Vehicle::_remoteControlRSSIChanged);
125
126 _commonInit(link);
127
128 // Set video stream to udp if running ArduSub and Video is disabled
129 if (sub() && SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->videoSource()->rawValue() == VideoSettings::videoDisabled) {
130 SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->videoSource()->setRawValue(VideoSettings::videoSourceUDPH264);
131 SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->lowLatencyMode()->setRawValue(true);
132 }
133
134 _autopilotPlugin = _firmwarePlugin->autopilotPlugin(this);
135 _autopilotPlugin->setParent(this);
136
137 // PreArm Error self-destruct timer
138 connect(&_prearmErrorTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &Vehicle::_prearmErrorTimeout);
139 _prearmErrorTimer.setInterval(_prearmErrorTimeoutMSecs);
140 _prearmErrorTimer.setSingleShot(true);
141
142 // Send MAV_CMD ack timer
143 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.setSingleShot(false);
144 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.setInterval(_mavCommandResponseCheckTimeoutMSecs());
145 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.start();
146 connect(&_mavCommandResponseCheckTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &Vehicle::_sendMavCommandResponseTimeoutCheck);
147
148 // MAV_TYPE_GENERIC is used by unit test for creating a vehicle which doesn't do the connect sequence. This
149 // way we can test the methods that are used within the connect sequence.
150 if (!qgcApp()->runningUnitTests() || _vehicleType != MAV_TYPE_GENERIC) {
151 _initialConnectStateMachine->start();
152 }
153
154 _firmwarePlugin->initializeVehicle(this);
155 for(auto& factName: factNames()) {
156 _firmwarePlugin->adjustMetaData(vehicleType, getFact(factName)->metaData());
157 }
158
159 _sendMultipleTimer.start(_sendMessageMultipleIntraMessageDelay);
160 connect(&_sendMultipleTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &Vehicle::_sendMessageMultipleNext);
161
162 connect(&_orbitTelemetryTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &Vehicle::_orbitTelemetryTimeout);
163
164 // Start csv logger
165 connect(&_csvLogTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &Vehicle::_writeCsvLine);
166 _csvLogTimer.start(1000);
167
168 // Start timer to limit altitude above terrain queries
169 _altitudeAboveTerrQueryTimer.restart();
170}
171
172// Disconnected Vehicle for offline editing
173Vehicle::Vehicle(MAV_AUTOPILOT firmwareType,
174 MAV_TYPE vehicleType,
175 QObject* parent)
176 : VehicleFactGroup (parent)
177 , _systemID (0)
178 , _defaultComponentId (MAV_COMP_ID_ALL)
179 , _offlineEditingVehicle (true)
180 , _firmwareType (firmwareType)
181 , _vehicleType (vehicleType)
182 , _defaultCruiseSpeed (SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingCruiseSpeed()->rawValue().toDouble())
183 , _defaultHoverSpeed (SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingHoverSpeed()->rawValue().toDouble())
184 , _capabilityBitsKnown (true)
185 , _capabilityBits (MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_MISSION_FENCE | MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_MISSION_RALLY)
186 , _trajectoryPoints (new TrajectoryPoints(this, this))
187 , _mavlinkStreamConfig (std::bind(&Vehicle::_setMessageInterval, this, std::placeholders::_1, std::placeholders::_2))
188 , _vehicleFactGroup (this)
189 , _gpsFactGroup (this)
190 , _gps2FactGroup (this)
191 , _gpsAggregateFactGroup (this)
192 , _windFactGroup (this)
193 , _vibrationFactGroup (this)
194 , _clockFactGroup (this)
195 , _distanceSensorFactGroup (this)
196 , _localPositionFactGroup (this)
197 , _localPositionSetpointFactGroup (this)
198{
199 // This will also set the settings based firmware/vehicle types. So it needs to happen first.
200 if (_firmwareType == MAV_AUTOPILOT_TRACK) {
201 trackFirmwareVehicleTypeChanges();
202 }
203
204 _commonInit(nullptr /* link */);
205
206 connect(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingCruiseSpeed(), &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::_offlineCruiseSpeedSettingChanged);
207 connect(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingHoverSpeed(), &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::_offlineHoverSpeedSettingChanged);
208
209 _offlineFirmwareTypeSettingChanged(_firmwareType); // This adds correct terrain capability bit
210 _firmwarePlugin->initializeVehicle(this);
211}
212
213void Vehicle::trackFirmwareVehicleTypeChanges(void)
214{
215 connect(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingFirmwareClass(), &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::_offlineFirmwareTypeSettingChanged);
216 connect(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingVehicleClass(), &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::_offlineVehicleTypeSettingChanged);
217
218 _offlineFirmwareTypeSettingChanged(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingFirmwareClass()->rawValue());
219 _offlineVehicleTypeSettingChanged(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingVehicleClass()->rawValue());
220}
221
222void Vehicle::stopTrackingFirmwareVehicleTypeChanges(void)
223{
224 disconnect(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingFirmwareClass(), &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::_offlineFirmwareTypeSettingChanged);
225 disconnect(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->offlineEditingVehicleClass(), &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::_offlineVehicleTypeSettingChanged);
226}
227
228void Vehicle::_commonInit(LinkInterface* link)
229{
230 _firmwarePlugin = FirmwarePluginManager::instance()->firmwarePluginForAutopilot(_firmwareType, _vehicleType);
231
232 connect(_firmwarePlugin, &FirmwarePlugin::toolIndicatorsChanged, this, &Vehicle::toolIndicatorsChanged);
233
234 connect(this, &Vehicle::coordinateChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateDistanceHeadingHome);
235 connect(this, &Vehicle::coordinateChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateDistanceHeadingGCS);
236 connect(this, &Vehicle::homePositionChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateDistanceHeadingHome);
237 connect(this, &Vehicle::hobbsMeterChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateHobbsMeter);
238 connect(this, &Vehicle::coordinateChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateAltAboveTerrain);
239 connect(this, &Vehicle::vehicleTypeChanged, this, &Vehicle::inFwdFlightChanged);
240 connect(this, &Vehicle::vtolInFwdFlightChanged, this, &Vehicle::inFwdFlightChanged);
241
242 connect(QGCPositionManager::instance(), &QGCPositionManager::gcsPositionChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateDistanceHeadingGCS);
243 connect(QGCPositionManager::instance(), &QGCPositionManager::gcsPositionChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateHomepoint);
244
245 _missionManager = new MissionManager(this);
246 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::error, this, &Vehicle::_missionManagerError);
247 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::newMissionItemsAvailable, this, &Vehicle::_firstMissionLoadComplete);
248 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::newMissionItemsAvailable, this, &Vehicle::_clearCameraTriggerPoints);
249 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::sendComplete, this, &Vehicle::_clearCameraTriggerPoints);
250 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::currentIndexChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateHeadingToNextWP);
251 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::currentIndexChanged, this, &Vehicle::_updateMissionItemIndex);
252
253 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::sendComplete, _trajectoryPoints, &TrajectoryPoints::clear);
254 connect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::newMissionItemsAvailable, _trajectoryPoints, &TrajectoryPoints::clear);
255
256 _standardModes = new StandardModes (this, this);
257 _componentInformationManager = new ComponentInformationManager (this, this);
258 _initialConnectStateMachine = new InitialConnectStateMachine (this, this);
259 _ftpManager = new FTPManager (this);
260
261 _vehicleLinkManager = new VehicleLinkManager(this);
262 if (link) {
263 _vehicleLinkManager->_addLink(link);
264 }
265
266 connect(_standardModes, &StandardModes::modesUpdated, this, &Vehicle::flightModesChanged);
267 // Re-emit flightModeChanged after available modes mapping updates so UI refreshes
268 // the human-readable mode name even if HEARTBEAT arrived earlier.
269 connect(_standardModes, &StandardModes::modesUpdated, this, [this]() {
270 emit flightModeChanged(flightMode());
271 });
272
273 _parameterManager = new ParameterManager(this);
274 connect(_parameterManager, &ParameterManager::parametersReadyChanged, this, &Vehicle::_parametersReady);
275 connect(_parameterManager, &ParameterManager::parametersReadyChanged, this, [this](bool) {
276 emit hasGripperChanged();
277 });
278 connect(_initialConnectStateMachine, &InitialConnectStateMachine::progressUpdate,
279 this, &Vehicle::_gotProgressUpdate);
280 connect(_parameterManager, &ParameterManager::loadProgressChanged, this, &Vehicle::_gotProgressUpdate);
281
282 _objectAvoidance = new VehicleObjectAvoidance(this, this);
283
284 _autotune = _firmwarePlugin->createAutotune(this);
285
286 // GeoFenceManager needs to access ParameterManager so make sure to create after
287 _geoFenceManager = new GeoFenceManager(this);
288 connect(_geoFenceManager, &GeoFenceManager::error, this, &Vehicle::_geoFenceManagerError);
289 connect(_geoFenceManager, &GeoFenceManager::loadComplete, this, &Vehicle::_firstGeoFenceLoadComplete);
290
291 _rallyPointManager = new RallyPointManager(this);
292 connect(_rallyPointManager, &RallyPointManager::error, this, &Vehicle::_rallyPointManagerError);
293 connect(_rallyPointManager, &RallyPointManager::loadComplete, this, &Vehicle::_firstRallyPointLoadComplete);
294
295 // Remote ID manager might want to acces parameters so make sure to create it after
296 _remoteIDManager = new RemoteIDManager(this);
297
298 // Flight modes can differ based on advanced mode
299 connect(QGCCorePlugin::instance(), &QGCCorePlugin::showAdvancedUIChanged, this, &Vehicle::flightModesChanged);
300
301 _gpsAggregateFactGroup.bindToGps(&_gpsFactGroup, &_gps2FactGroup);
302
303 _createImageProtocolManager();
304 _createStatusTextHandler();
305 _createMAVLinkLogManager();
306
307 // _addFactGroup(_vehicleFactGroup, _vehicleFactGroupName);
308 _addFactGroup(&_gpsFactGroup, _gpsFactGroupName);
309 _addFactGroup(&_gps2FactGroup, _gps2FactGroupName);
310 _addFactGroup(&_gpsAggregateFactGroup, _gpsAggregateFactGroupName);
311 _addFactGroup(&_windFactGroup, _windFactGroupName);
312 _addFactGroup(&_vibrationFactGroup, _vibrationFactGroupName);
313 _addFactGroup(&_temperatureFactGroup, _temperatureFactGroupName);
314 _addFactGroup(&_clockFactGroup, _clockFactGroupName);
315 _addFactGroup(&_setpointFactGroup, _setpointFactGroupName);
316 _addFactGroup(&_distanceSensorFactGroup, _distanceSensorFactGroupName);
317 _addFactGroup(&_localPositionFactGroup, _localPositionFactGroupName);
318 _addFactGroup(&_localPositionSetpointFactGroup,_localPositionSetpointFactGroupName);
319 _addFactGroup(&_estimatorStatusFactGroup, _estimatorStatusFactGroupName);
320 _addFactGroup(&_hygrometerFactGroup, _hygrometerFactGroupName);
321 _addFactGroup(&_generatorFactGroup, _generatorFactGroupName);
322 _addFactGroup(&_efiFactGroup, _efiFactGroupName);
323 _addFactGroup(&_rpmFactGroup, _rpmFactGroupName);
324 _addFactGroup(&_terrainFactGroup, _terrainFactGroupName);
325
326 // Add firmware-specific fact groups, if provided
327 QMap<QString, FactGroup*>* fwFactGroups = _firmwarePlugin->factGroups();
328 if (fwFactGroups) {
329 for (auto it = fwFactGroups->keyValueBegin(); it != fwFactGroups->keyValueEnd(); ++it) {
330 _addFactGroup(it->second, it->first);
331 }
332 }
333
334 _flightTimeUpdater.setInterval(1000);
335 _flightTimeUpdater.setSingleShot(false);
336 connect(&_flightTimeUpdater, &QTimer::timeout, this, &Vehicle::_updateFlightTime);
337
338 // Set video stream to udp if running ArduSub and Video is disabled
339 if (sub() && SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->videoSource()->rawValue() == VideoSettings::videoDisabled) {
340 SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->videoSource()->setRawValue(VideoSettings::videoSourceUDPH264);
341 SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->lowLatencyMode()->setRawValue(true);
342 }
343
344 _gimbalController = new GimbalController(this);
345
346 _createCameraManager();
347}
348
349Vehicle::~Vehicle()
350{
351 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "~Vehicle" << this;
352
353 // Stop all timers and disconnect their signals to prevent any callbacks during destruction.
354 // Even though _stopCommandProcessing() should have been called earlier via VehicleLinkManager,
355 // we do it again here defensively in case the vehicle is destroyed without going through
356 // the normal link removal path (e.g., in unit tests).
357 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.stop();
358 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.disconnect();
359 _sendMultipleTimer.stop();
360 _sendMultipleTimer.disconnect();
361 _prearmErrorTimer.stop();
362 _prearmErrorTimer.disconnect();
363
364 delete _missionManager;
365 _missionManager = nullptr;
366
367 delete _autopilotPlugin;
368 _autopilotPlugin = nullptr;
369}
370
371void Vehicle::_deleteCameraManager()
372{
373 if(_cameraManager) {
374 // Disconnect all signals to prevent any callbacks during or after deletion
375 _cameraManager->disconnect();
376 delete _cameraManager;
377 _cameraManager = nullptr;
378 }
379}
380
381void Vehicle::_deleteGimbalController()
382{
383 if (_gimbalController) {
384 // Disconnect all signals to prevent any callbacks during or after deletion
385 _gimbalController->disconnect();
386 delete _gimbalController;
387 _gimbalController = nullptr;
388 }
389}
390
391void Vehicle::_stopCommandProcessing()
392{
393 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_stopCommandProcessing - stopping timers and clearing pending commands";
394
395 // Stop timers AND disconnect their signals to prevent any pending callbacks
396 // from being delivered after this point. This is critical during vehicle destruction
397 // where a queued callback could access a partially-destroyed vehicle.
398 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.stop();
399 _mavCommandResponseCheckTimer.disconnect();
400 _sendMultipleTimer.stop();
401 _sendMultipleTimer.disconnect();
402
403 // Clear pending commands without calling callbacks (vehicle is being destroyed)
404 _mavCommandList.clear();
405
406 // Clear request message info map - delete the allocated RequestMessageInfo objects
407 for (auto& compIdEntry : _requestMessageInfoMap) {
408 qDeleteAll(compIdEntry);
409 }
410 _requestMessageInfoMap.clear();
411
412 for (auto& requestQueue : _requestMessageQueueMap) {
413 qDeleteAll(requestQueue);
414 }
415 _requestMessageQueueMap.clear();
416}
417
418void Vehicle::_offlineFirmwareTypeSettingChanged(QVariant varFirmwareType)
419{
420 _firmwareType = static_cast<MAV_AUTOPILOT>(varFirmwareType.toInt());
421 _firmwarePlugin = FirmwarePluginManager::instance()->firmwarePluginForAutopilot(_firmwareType, _vehicleType);
422 if (_firmwareType == MAV_AUTOPILOT_ARDUPILOTMEGA) {
423 _capabilityBits |= MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_TERRAIN;
424 } else {
425 _capabilityBits &= ~MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_TERRAIN;
426 }
427 emit firmwareTypeChanged();
428 emit capabilityBitsChanged(_capabilityBits);
429}
430
431void Vehicle::_offlineVehicleTypeSettingChanged(QVariant varVehicleType)
432{
433 _vehicleType = static_cast<MAV_TYPE>(varVehicleType.toInt());
434 emit vehicleTypeChanged();
435}
436
437void Vehicle::_offlineCruiseSpeedSettingChanged(QVariant value)
438{
439 _defaultCruiseSpeed = value.toDouble();
440 emit defaultCruiseSpeedChanged(_defaultCruiseSpeed);
441}
442
443void Vehicle::_offlineHoverSpeedSettingChanged(QVariant value)
444{
445 _defaultHoverSpeed = value.toDouble();
446 emit defaultHoverSpeedChanged(_defaultHoverSpeed);
447}
448
449QString Vehicle::firmwareTypeString() const
450{
451 return QGCMAVLink::firmwareClassToString(_firmwareType);
452}
453
454void Vehicle::resetCounters()
455{
456 _messagesReceived = 0;
457 _messagesSent = 0;
458 _messagesLost = 0;
459 _messageSeq = 0;
460 _heardFrom = false;
461}
462
463void Vehicle::_mavlinkMessageReceived(LinkInterface* link, mavlink_message_t message)
464{
465 if (message.sysid != _systemID && message.sysid != 0) {
466 // We allow RADIO_STATUS messages which come from a link the vehicle is using to pass through and be handled
467 if (!(message.msgid == MAVLINK_MSG_ID_RADIO_STATUS && _vehicleLinkManager->containsLink(link))) {
468 return;
469 }
470 }
471
472 // We give the link manager first whack since it it reponsible for adding new links
473 _vehicleLinkManager->mavlinkMessageReceived(link, message);
474
475 //-- Check link status
476 _messagesReceived++;
477 emit messagesReceivedChanged();
478 if(!_heardFrom) {
479 if(message.msgid == MAVLINK_MSG_ID_HEARTBEAT) {
480 _heardFrom = true;
481 _compID = message.compid;
482 _messageSeq = message.seq + 1;
483 }
484 } else {
485 if(_compID == message.compid) {
486 uint16_t seq_received = static_cast<uint16_t>(message.seq);
487 uint16_t packet_lost_count = 0;
488 //-- Account for overflow during packet loss
489 if(seq_received < _messageSeq) {
490 packet_lost_count = (seq_received + 255) - _messageSeq;
491 } else {
492 packet_lost_count = seq_received - _messageSeq;
493 }
494 _messageSeq = message.seq + 1;
495 _messagesLost += packet_lost_count;
496 if(packet_lost_count)
497 emit messagesLostChanged();
498 }
499 }
500
501 // Give the plugin a change to adjust the message contents
502 if (!_firmwarePlugin->adjustIncomingMavlinkMessage(this, &message)) {
503 return;
504 }
505
506 // Give the Core Plugin access to all mavlink traffic
507 if (!QGCCorePlugin::instance()->mavlinkMessage(this, link, message)) {
508 return;
509 }
510
511 if (!_terrainProtocolHandler->mavlinkMessageReceived(message)) {
512 return;
513 }
514 _ftpManager->_mavlinkMessageReceived(message);
515 _parameterManager->mavlinkMessageReceived(message);
516 (void) QMetaObject::invokeMethod(_imageProtocolManager, "mavlinkMessageReceived", Qt::AutoConnection, message);
517 _remoteIDManager->mavlinkMessageReceived(message);
518
519 _waitForMavlinkMessageMessageReceivedHandler(message);
520
521 // Handle creation of dynamic fact group lists
522 _batteryFactGroupListModel.handleMessageForFactGroupCreation(this, message);
523 _escStatusFactGroupListModel.handleMessageForFactGroupCreation(this, message);
524
525 // Let the fact groups take a whack at the mavlink traffic
526 for (FactGroup* factGroup : factGroups()) {
527 factGroup->handleMessage(this, message);
528 }
529
530 this->handleMessage(this, message);
531
532 switch (message.msgid) {
533 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_HOME_POSITION:
534 _handleHomePosition(message);
535 break;
536 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_HEARTBEAT:
537 _handleHeartbeat(message);
538 break;
539 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_RADIO_STATUS:
540 _handleRadioStatus(message);
541 break;
542 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_RC_CHANNELS:
543 _handleRCChannels(message);
544 break;
545 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_BATTERY_STATUS:
546 _handleBatteryStatus(message);
547 break;
548 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_SYS_STATUS:
549 _handleSysStatus(message);
550 break;
551 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_EXTENDED_SYS_STATE:
552 _handleExtendedSysState(message);
553 break;
554 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_COMMAND_ACK:
555 _handleCommandAck(message);
556 break;
557 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_LOGGING_DATA:
558 _handleMavlinkLoggingData(message);
559 break;
560 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_LOGGING_DATA_ACKED:
561 _handleMavlinkLoggingDataAcked(message);
562 break;
563 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_GPS_RAW_INT:
564 _handleGpsRawInt(message);
565 break;
566 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_GLOBAL_POSITION_INT:
567 _handleGlobalPositionInt(message);
568 break;
569 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_CAMERA_IMAGE_CAPTURED:
570 _handleCameraImageCaptured(message);
571 break;
572 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_ADSB_VEHICLE:
573 ADSBVehicleManager::instance()->mavlinkMessageReceived(message);
574 break;
575 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_HIGH_LATENCY:
576 _handleHighLatency(message);
577 break;
578 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_HIGH_LATENCY2:
579 _handleHighLatency2(message);
580 break;
581 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_STATUSTEXT:
582 m_statusTextHandler->mavlinkMessageReceived(message);
583 break;
584 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_ORBIT_EXECUTION_STATUS:
585 _handleOrbitExecutionStatus(message);
586 break;
587 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_PING:
588 _handlePing(link, message);
589 break;
590 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_OBSTACLE_DISTANCE:
591 _handleObstacleDistance(message);
592 break;
593 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_FENCE_STATUS:
594 _handleFenceStatus(message);
595 break;
596
597 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_EVENT:
598 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_CURRENT_EVENT_SEQUENCE:
599 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_RESPONSE_EVENT_ERROR:
600 _eventHandler(message.compid).handleEvents(message);
601 break;
602
603 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_SERIAL_CONTROL:
604 {
605 mavlink_serial_control_t ser;
606 mavlink_msg_serial_control_decode(&message, &ser);
607 if (static_cast<size_t>(ser.count) > sizeof(ser.data)) {
608 qWarning() << "Invalid count for SERIAL_CONTROL, discarding." << ser.count;
609 } else {
610 emit mavlinkSerialControl(ser.device, ser.flags, ser.timeout, ser.baudrate,
611 QByteArray(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(ser.data), ser.count));
612 }
613 }
614 break;
615 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_AVAILABLE_MODES_MONITOR:
616 {
617 // Avoid duplicate requests during initial connection setup
618 if (!_initialConnectStateMachine || !_initialConnectStateMachine->active()) {
619 mavlink_available_modes_monitor_t availableModesMonitor;
620 mavlink_msg_available_modes_monitor_decode(&message, &availableModesMonitor);
621 _standardModes->availableModesMonitorReceived(availableModesMonitor.seq);
622 }
623 break;
624 }
625 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_CURRENT_MODE:
626 _handleCurrentMode(message);
627 break;
628
629 // Following are ArduPilot dialect messages
630#if !defined(QGC_NO_ARDUPILOT_DIALECT)
631 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_CAMERA_FEEDBACK:
632 _handleCameraFeedback(message);
633 break;
634#endif
635 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_LOG_ENTRY:
636 {
637 mavlink_log_entry_t log{};
638 mavlink_msg_log_entry_decode(&message, &log);
639 emit logEntry(log.time_utc, log.size, log.id, log.num_logs, log.last_log_num);
640 break;
641 }
642 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_LOG_DATA:
643 {
644 mavlink_log_data_t log{};
645 mavlink_msg_log_data_decode(&message, &log);
646 emit logData(log.ofs, log.id, log.count, log.data);
647 break;
648 }
649 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_MESSAGE_INTERVAL:
650 {
651 _handleMessageInterval(message);
652 break;
653 }
654 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_CONTROL_STATUS:
655 _handleControlStatus(message);
656 break;
657 case MAVLINK_MSG_ID_COMMAND_LONG:
658 _handleCommandLong(message);
659 break;
660 }
661
662 // This must be emitted after the vehicle processes the message. This way the vehicle state is up to date when anyone else
663 // does processing.
664 emit mavlinkMessageReceived(message);
665}
666
667#if !defined(QGC_NO_ARDUPILOT_DIALECT)
668void Vehicle::_handleCameraFeedback(const mavlink_message_t& message)
669{
670 mavlink_camera_feedback_t feedback;
671
672 mavlink_msg_camera_feedback_decode(&message, &feedback);
673
674 QGeoCoordinate imageCoordinate((double)feedback.lat / qPow(10.0, 7.0), (double)feedback.lng / qPow(10.0, 7.0), feedback.alt_msl);
675 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_handleCameraFeedback coord:index" << imageCoordinate << feedback.img_idx;
676 _cameraTriggerPoints.append(new QGCQGeoCoordinate(imageCoordinate, this));
677}
678#endif
679
680void Vehicle::_handleOrbitExecutionStatus(const mavlink_message_t& message)
681{
682 mavlink_orbit_execution_status_t orbitStatus;
683
684 mavlink_msg_orbit_execution_status_decode(&message, &orbitStatus);
685
686 double newRadius = qAbs(static_cast<double>(orbitStatus.radius));
687 if (!QGC::fuzzyCompare(_orbitMapCircle.radius()->rawValue().toDouble(), newRadius)) {
688 _orbitMapCircle.radius()->setRawValue(newRadius);
689 }
690
691 bool newOrbitClockwise = orbitStatus.radius > 0 ? true : false;
692 if (_orbitMapCircle.clockwiseRotation() != newOrbitClockwise) {
693 _orbitMapCircle.setClockwiseRotation(newOrbitClockwise);
694 }
695
696 QGeoCoordinate newCenter(static_cast<double>(orbitStatus.x) / qPow(10.0, 7.0), static_cast<double>(orbitStatus.y) / qPow(10.0, 7.0));
697 if (_orbitMapCircle.center() != newCenter) {
698 _orbitMapCircle.setCenter(newCenter);
699 }
700
701 if (!_orbitActive) {
702 _orbitActive = true;
703 _orbitMapCircle.setShowRotation(true);
704 emit orbitActiveChanged(true);
705 }
706
707 _orbitTelemetryTimer.start(_orbitTelemetryTimeoutMsecs);
708}
709
710void Vehicle::_orbitTelemetryTimeout()
711{
712 _orbitActive = false;
713 emit orbitActiveChanged(false);
714}
715
716void Vehicle::_handleCameraImageCaptured(const mavlink_message_t& message)
717{
718 mavlink_camera_image_captured_t feedback;
719
720 mavlink_msg_camera_image_captured_decode(&message, &feedback);
721
722 QGeoCoordinate imageCoordinate((double)feedback.lat / qPow(10.0, 7.0), (double)feedback.lon / qPow(10.0, 7.0), feedback.alt);
723 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_handleCameraFeedback coord:index" << imageCoordinate << feedback.image_index << feedback.capture_result;
724 if (feedback.capture_result == 1) {
725 _cameraTriggerPoints.append(new QGCQGeoCoordinate(imageCoordinate, this));
726 }
727}
728
729// TODO: VehicleFactGroup
730void Vehicle::_handleGpsRawInt(mavlink_message_t& message)
731{
732 mavlink_gps_raw_int_t gpsRawInt;
733 mavlink_msg_gps_raw_int_decode(&message, &gpsRawInt);
734
735 _gpsRawIntMessageAvailable = true;
736
737 if (gpsRawInt.fix_type >= GPS_FIX_TYPE_3D_FIX) {
738 if (!_globalPositionIntMessageAvailable) {
739 QGeoCoordinate newPosition(gpsRawInt.lat / (double)1E7, gpsRawInt.lon / (double)1E7, gpsRawInt.alt / 1000.0);
740 if (newPosition != _coordinate) {
741 _coordinate = newPosition;
742 emit coordinateChanged(_coordinate);
743 }
744 if (!_altitudeMessageAvailable) {
745 _altitudeAMSLFact.setRawValue(gpsRawInt.alt / 1000.0);
746 }
747 }
748 }
749}
750
751// TODO: VehicleFactGroup
752void Vehicle::_handleGlobalPositionInt(mavlink_message_t& message)
753{
754 mavlink_global_position_int_t globalPositionInt;
755 mavlink_msg_global_position_int_decode(&message, &globalPositionInt);
756
757 if (!_altitudeMessageAvailable) {
758 _altitudeRelativeFact.setRawValue(globalPositionInt.relative_alt / 1000.0);
759 _altitudeAMSLFact.setRawValue(globalPositionInt.alt / 1000.0);
760 }
761
762 // ArduPilot sends bogus GLOBAL_POSITION_INT messages with lat/lat 0/0 even when it has no gps signal
763 // Apparently, this is in order to transport relative altitude information.
764 if (globalPositionInt.lat == 0 && globalPositionInt.lon == 0) {
765 return;
766 }
767
768 _globalPositionIntMessageAvailable = true;
769 QGeoCoordinate newPosition(globalPositionInt.lat / (double)1E7, globalPositionInt.lon / (double)1E7, globalPositionInt.alt / 1000.0);
770 if (newPosition != _coordinate) {
771 _coordinate = newPosition;
772 emit coordinateChanged(_coordinate);
773 }
774}
775
776// TODO: VehicleFactGroup
777void Vehicle::_handleHighLatency(mavlink_message_t& message)
778{
779 mavlink_high_latency_t highLatency;
780 mavlink_msg_high_latency_decode(&message, &highLatency);
781
782 QString previousFlightMode;
783 if (_base_mode != 0 || _custom_mode != 0){
784 // Vehicle is initialized with _base_mode=0 and _custom_mode=0. Don't pass this to flightMode() since it will complain about
785 // bad modes while unit testing.
786 previousFlightMode = flightMode();
787 }
788 _base_mode = MAV_MODE_FLAG_CUSTOM_MODE_ENABLED;
789 _custom_mode = _firmwarePlugin->highLatencyCustomModeTo32Bits(highLatency.custom_mode);
790 if (previousFlightMode != flightMode()) {
791 emit flightModeChanged(flightMode());
792 }
793
794 // Assume armed since we don't know
795 if (_armed != true) {
796 _armed = true;
797 emit armedChanged(_armed);
798 }
799
800 struct {
801 const double latitude;
802 const double longitude;
803 const double altitude;
804 } coordinate {
805 highLatency.latitude / (double)1E7,
806 highLatency.longitude / (double)1E7,
807 static_cast<double>(highLatency.altitude_amsl)
808 };
809
810 _coordinate.setLatitude(coordinate.latitude);
811 _coordinate.setLongitude(coordinate.longitude);
812 _coordinate.setAltitude(coordinate.altitude);
813 emit coordinateChanged(_coordinate);
814
815 _airSpeedFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency.airspeed / 5.0);
816 _groundSpeedFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency.groundspeed / 5.0);
817 _climbRateFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency.climb_rate / 10.0);
818 _headingFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency.heading * 2.0);
819 _altitudeRelativeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
820 _altitudeAMSLFact.setRawValue(coordinate.altitude);
821}
822
823// TODO: VehicleFactGroup
824void Vehicle::_handleHighLatency2(mavlink_message_t& message)
825{
826 mavlink_high_latency2_t highLatency2;
827 mavlink_msg_high_latency2_decode(&message, &highLatency2);
828
829 QString previousFlightMode;
830 if (_base_mode != 0 || _custom_mode != 0){
831 // Vehicle is initialized with _base_mode=0 and _custom_mode=0. Don't pass this to flightMode() since it will complain about
832 // bad modes while unit testing.
833 previousFlightMode = flightMode();
834 }
835 // ArduPilot has the basemode in the custom0 field of the high latency message.
836 if (highLatency2.autopilot == MAV_AUTOPILOT_ARDUPILOTMEGA) {
837 _base_mode = (uint8_t)highLatency2.custom0;
838 } else {
839 _base_mode = MAV_MODE_FLAG_CUSTOM_MODE_ENABLED;
840 }
841 _custom_mode = _firmwarePlugin->highLatencyCustomModeTo32Bits(highLatency2.custom_mode);
842 if (previousFlightMode != flightMode()) {
843 emit flightModeChanged(flightMode());
844 }
845 // ArduPilot has the arming status (basemode) in the custom0 field of the high latency message.
846 if (highLatency2.autopilot == MAV_AUTOPILOT_ARDUPILOTMEGA) {
847 if ((uint8_t)highLatency2.custom0 & MAV_MODE_FLAG_SAFETY_ARMED && _armed != true) {
848 _armed = true;
849 emit armedChanged(_armed);
850 } else if (!((uint8_t)highLatency2.custom0 & MAV_MODE_FLAG_SAFETY_ARMED) && _armed != false) {
851 _armed = false;
852 emit armedChanged(_armed);
853 }
854 } else {
855 // Assume armed since we don't know
856 if (_armed != true) {
857 _armed = true;
858 emit armedChanged(_armed);
859 }
860 }
861
862 _coordinate.setLatitude(highLatency2.latitude / (double)1E7);
863 _coordinate.setLongitude(highLatency2.longitude / (double)1E7);
864 _coordinate.setAltitude(highLatency2.altitude);
865 emit coordinateChanged(_coordinate);
866
867 _airSpeedFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency2.airspeed / 5.0);
868 _groundSpeedFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency2.groundspeed / 5.0);
869 _climbRateFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency2.climb_rate / 10.0);
870 _headingFact.setRawValue((double)highLatency2.heading * 2.0);
871 _altitudeRelativeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
872 _altitudeAMSLFact.setRawValue(highLatency2.altitude);
873
874 // Map from MAV_FAILURE bits to standard SYS_STATUS message handling
875 const uint32_t newOnboardControlSensorsEnabled = QGCMAVLink::highLatencyFailuresToMavSysStatus(highLatency2);
876 if (newOnboardControlSensorsEnabled != _onboardControlSensorsEnabled) {
877 _onboardControlSensorsEnabled = newOnboardControlSensorsEnabled;
878 _onboardControlSensorsPresent = newOnboardControlSensorsEnabled;
879 _onboardControlSensorsUnhealthy = 0;
880 }
881}
882
883void Vehicle::_setCapabilities(uint64_t capabilityBits)
884{
885 _capabilityBits = capabilityBits;
886 _capabilityBitsKnown = true;
887 emit capabilitiesKnownChanged(true);
888 emit capabilityBitsChanged(_capabilityBits);
889
890 QString supports("supports");
891 QString doesNotSupport("does not support");
892
893 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QString("Vehicle %1 Mavlink 2.0").arg(_capabilityBits & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_MAVLINK2 ? supports : doesNotSupport);
894 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QString("Vehicle %1 MISSION_ITEM_INT").arg(_capabilityBits & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_MISSION_INT ? supports : doesNotSupport);
895 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QString("Vehicle %1 MISSION_COMMAND_INT").arg(_capabilityBits & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_COMMAND_INT ? supports : doesNotSupport);
896 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QString("Vehicle %1 GeoFence").arg(_capabilityBits & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_MISSION_FENCE ? supports : doesNotSupport);
897 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QString("Vehicle %1 RallyPoints").arg(_capabilityBits & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_MISSION_RALLY ? supports : doesNotSupport);
898 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QString("Vehicle %1 Terrain").arg(_capabilityBits & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_TERRAIN ? supports : doesNotSupport);
899}
900
901QString Vehicle::vehicleUIDStr()
902{
903 QString uid;
904 uint8_t* pUid = (uint8_t*)(void*)&_uid;
905 uid = uid.asprintf("%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X:%02X",
906 pUid[0] & 0xff,
907 pUid[1] & 0xff,
908 pUid[2] & 0xff,
909 pUid[3] & 0xff,
910 pUid[4] & 0xff,
911 pUid[5] & 0xff,
912 pUid[6] & 0xff,
913 pUid[7] & 0xff);
914 return uid;
915}
916
917void Vehicle::_handleExtendedSysState(mavlink_message_t& message)
918{
919 mavlink_extended_sys_state_t extendedState;
920 mavlink_msg_extended_sys_state_decode(&message, &extendedState);
921
922 switch (extendedState.landed_state) {
923 case MAV_LANDED_STATE_ON_GROUND:
924 _setFlying(false);
925 _setLanding(false);
926 break;
927 case MAV_LANDED_STATE_TAKEOFF:
928 case MAV_LANDED_STATE_IN_AIR:
929 _setFlying(true);
930 _setLanding(false);
931 break;
932 case MAV_LANDED_STATE_LANDING:
933 _setFlying(true);
934 _setLanding(true);
935 break;
936 default:
937 break;
938 }
939
940 if (vtol()) {
941 bool vtolInFwdFlight = extendedState.vtol_state == MAV_VTOL_STATE_FW;
942 if (vtolInFwdFlight != _vtolInFwdFlight) {
943 _vtolInFwdFlight = vtolInFwdFlight;
944 emit vtolInFwdFlightChanged(vtolInFwdFlight);
945 }
946 }
947}
948
949bool Vehicle::_apmArmingNotRequired()
950{
951 QString armingRequireParam("ARMING_REQUIRE");
952 return _parameterManager->parameterExists(ParameterManager::defaultComponentId, armingRequireParam) &&
953 _parameterManager->getParameter(ParameterManager::defaultComponentId, armingRequireParam)->rawValue().toInt() == 0;
954}
955
956void Vehicle::_handleSysStatus(mavlink_message_t& message)
957{
958 if (message.compid != _defaultComponentId) {
959 return;
960 }
961
962 mavlink_sys_status_t sysStatus;
963 mavlink_msg_sys_status_decode(&message, &sysStatus);
964
965 _sysStatusSensorInfo.update(sysStatus);
966
967 if (sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_enabled & MAV_SYS_STATUS_PREARM_CHECK) {
968 if (!_readyToFlyAvailable) {
969 _readyToFlyAvailable = true;
970 emit readyToFlyAvailableChanged(true);
971 }
972
973 bool newReadyToFly = sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_health & MAV_SYS_STATUS_PREARM_CHECK;
974 if (newReadyToFly != _readyToFly) {
975 _readyToFly = newReadyToFly;
976 emit readyToFlyChanged(_readyToFly);
977 }
978 }
979
980 bool newAllSensorsHealthy = (sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_enabled & sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_health) == sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_enabled;
981 if (newAllSensorsHealthy != _allSensorsHealthy) {
982 _allSensorsHealthy = newAllSensorsHealthy;
983 emit allSensorsHealthyChanged(_allSensorsHealthy);
984 }
985
986 if (_onboardControlSensorsPresent != sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_present) {
987 _onboardControlSensorsPresent = sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_present;
988 emit sensorsPresentBitsChanged(_onboardControlSensorsPresent);
989 emit requiresGpsFixChanged();
990 }
991 if (_onboardControlSensorsEnabled != sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_enabled) {
992 _onboardControlSensorsEnabled = sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_enabled;
993 emit sensorsEnabledBitsChanged(_onboardControlSensorsEnabled);
994 }
995 if (_onboardControlSensorsHealth != sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_health) {
996 _onboardControlSensorsHealth = sysStatus.onboard_control_sensors_health;
997 emit sensorsHealthBitsChanged(_onboardControlSensorsHealth);
998 }
999
1000 // ArduPilot firmare has a strange case when ARMING_REQUIRE=0. This means the vehicle is always armed but the motors are not
1001 // really powered up until the safety button is pressed. Because of this we can't depend on the heartbeat to tell us the true
1002 // armed (and dangerous) state. We must instead rely on SYS_STATUS telling us that the motors are enabled.
1003 if (apmFirmware() && _apmArmingNotRequired()) {
1004 _updateArmed(_onboardControlSensorsEnabled & MAV_SYS_STATUS_SENSOR_MOTOR_OUTPUTS);
1005 }
1006
1007 uint32_t newSensorsUnhealthy = _onboardControlSensorsEnabled & ~_onboardControlSensorsHealth;
1008 if (newSensorsUnhealthy != _onboardControlSensorsUnhealthy) {
1009 _onboardControlSensorsUnhealthy = newSensorsUnhealthy;
1010 emit sensorsUnhealthyBitsChanged(_onboardControlSensorsUnhealthy);
1011 }
1012}
1013
1014void Vehicle::_handleBatteryStatus(mavlink_message_t& message)
1015{
1016 mavlink_battery_status_t batteryStatus;
1017 mavlink_msg_battery_status_decode(&message, &batteryStatus);
1018
1019 if (!_lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap.contains(batteryStatus.id)) {
1020 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1021 }
1022
1023 QString batteryMessage;
1024
1025 switch (batteryStatus.charge_state) {
1026 case MAV_BATTERY_CHARGE_STATE_OK:
1027 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1028 break;
1029 case MAV_BATTERY_CHARGE_STATE_LOW:
1030 if (batteryStatus.charge_state > _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id]) {
1031 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1032 batteryMessage = tr("battery %1 level low");
1033 }
1034 break;
1035 case MAV_BATTERY_CHARGE_STATE_CRITICAL:
1036 if (batteryStatus.charge_state > _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id]) {
1037 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1038 batteryMessage = tr("battery %1 level is critical");
1039 }
1040 break;
1041 case MAV_BATTERY_CHARGE_STATE_EMERGENCY:
1042 if (batteryStatus.charge_state > _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id]) {
1043 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1044 batteryMessage = tr("battery %1 level emergency");
1045 }
1046 break;
1047 case MAV_BATTERY_CHARGE_STATE_FAILED:
1048 if (batteryStatus.charge_state > _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id]) {
1049 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1050 batteryMessage = tr("battery %1 failed");
1051 }
1052 break;
1053 case MAV_BATTERY_CHARGE_STATE_UNHEALTHY:
1054 if (batteryStatus.charge_state > _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id]) {
1055 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap[batteryStatus.id] = batteryStatus.charge_state;
1056 batteryMessage = tr("battery %1 unhealthy");
1057 }
1058 break;
1059 }
1060
1061 if (!batteryMessage.isEmpty()) {
1062 QString batteryIdStr("%1");
1063 if (_batteryFactGroupListModel.count() > 1) {
1064 batteryIdStr = batteryIdStr.arg(batteryStatus.id);
1065 } else {
1066 batteryIdStr = batteryIdStr.arg("");
1067 }
1068 _say(tr("warning"));
1069 _say(QStringLiteral("%1 %2 ").arg(_vehicleIdSpeech()).arg(batteryMessage.arg(batteryIdStr)));
1070 }
1071}
1072
1073void Vehicle::_setHomePosition(QGeoCoordinate& homeCoord)
1074{
1075 if (homeCoord != _homePosition) {
1076 _homePosition = homeCoord;
1077 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "new home location set at coordinate: " << homeCoord;
1078 emit homePositionChanged(_homePosition);
1079 }
1080}
1081
1082void Vehicle::_handleHomePosition(mavlink_message_t& message)
1083{
1084 mavlink_home_position_t homePos;
1085
1086 mavlink_msg_home_position_decode(&message, &homePos);
1087
1088 QGeoCoordinate newHomePosition (homePos.latitude / 10000000.0,
1089 homePos.longitude / 10000000.0,
1090 homePos.altitude / 1000.0);
1091 _setHomePosition(newHomePosition);
1092}
1093
1094void Vehicle::_updateArmed(bool armed)
1095{
1096 if (_armed != armed) {
1097 _armed = armed;
1098 emit armedChanged(_armed);
1099 // We are transitioning to the armed state, begin tracking trajectory points for the map
1100 if (_armed) {
1101 _trajectoryPoints->start();
1102 _flightTimerStart();
1103 _clearCameraTriggerPoints();
1104 // Reset battery warning
1105 _lowestBatteryChargeStateAnnouncedMap.clear();
1106 } else {
1107 _trajectoryPoints->stop();
1108 _flightTimerStop();
1109 // Also handle Video Streaming
1110 if(SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->disableWhenDisarmed()->rawValue().toBool()) {
1111 SettingsManager::instance()->videoSettings()->streamEnabled()->setRawValue(false);
1112 VideoManager::instance()->stopVideo();
1113 }
1114 }
1115 }
1116}
1117
1118void Vehicle::_handlePing(LinkInterface* link, mavlink_message_t& message)
1119{
1120 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
1121 if (!sharedLink) {
1122 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_handlePing: primary link gone!";
1123 return;
1124 }
1125
1126 mavlink_ping_t ping;
1127 mavlink_message_t msg;
1128
1129 mavlink_msg_ping_decode(&message, &ping);
1130
1131 if ((ping.target_system == 0) && (ping.target_component == 0)) {
1132 // Mavlink defines a ping request as a MSG_ID_PING which contains target_system = 0 and target_component = 0
1133 // So only send a ping response when you receive a valid ping request
1134 mavlink_msg_ping_pack_chan(static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId()),
1135 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId()),
1136 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
1137 &msg,
1138 ping.time_usec,
1139 ping.seq,
1140 message.sysid,
1141 message.compid);
1142 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(link, msg);
1143 }
1144}
1145
1146void Vehicle::_handleEvent(uint8_t comp_id, std::unique_ptr<events::parser::ParsedEvent> event)
1147{
1148 int severity = -1;
1149 switch (events::externalLogLevel(event->eventData().log_levels)) {
1150 case events::Log::Emergency: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_EMERGENCY; break;
1151 case events::Log::Alert: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_ALERT; break;
1152 case events::Log::Critical: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_CRITICAL; break;
1153 case events::Log::Error: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_ERROR; break;
1154 case events::Log::Warning: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_WARNING; break;
1155 case events::Log::Notice: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_NOTICE; break;
1156 case events::Log::Info: severity = MAV_SEVERITY_INFO; break;
1157 default: break;
1158 }
1159
1160 // handle special groups & protocols
1161 if (event->group() == "health" || event->group() == "arming_check") {
1162 // these are displayed separately
1163 return;
1164 }
1165 if (event->group() == "calibration") {
1166 emit calibrationEventReceived(id(), comp_id, severity,
1167 QSharedPointer<events::parser::ParsedEvent>{new events::parser::ParsedEvent{*event}});
1168 // these are displayed separately
1169 return;
1170 }
1171
1172 // show message according to the log level, don't show unknown event groups (might be part of a new protocol)
1173 if (event->group() == "default" && severity != -1) {
1174 std::string message = event->message();
1175 std::string description = event->description();
1176
1177 if (event->type() == "append_health_and_arming_messages" && event->numArguments() > 0) {
1178 uint32_t customMode = event->argumentValue(0).value.val_uint32_t;
1179 const QSharedPointer<EventHandler>& eventHandler = _events[comp_id];
1180 int modeGroup = eventHandler->getModeGroup(customMode);
1181 std::vector<events::HealthAndArmingChecks::Check> checks = eventHandler->healthAndArmingCheckResults().checks(modeGroup);
1182 QList<std::string> messageChecks;
1183 for (const auto& check : checks) {
1184 if (events::externalLogLevel(check.log_levels) <= events::Log::Warning) {
1185 messageChecks.append(check.message);
1186 }
1187 }
1188 if (messageChecks.empty()) {
1189 // Add all
1190 for (const auto& check : checks) {
1191 messageChecks.append(check.message);
1192 }
1193 }
1194 if (!message.empty() && !messageChecks.empty()) {
1195 message += "\n";
1196 }
1197 if (messageChecks.size() == 1) {
1198 message += messageChecks[0];
1199 } else {
1200 for (const auto& messageCheck : messageChecks) {
1201 message += "- " + messageCheck + "\n";
1202 }
1203 }
1204 }
1205
1206 if (!message.empty()) {
1207 const QString text = QString::fromStdString(message);
1208 // Hack to prevent calibration messages from cluttering things up
1209 if (px4Firmware() && text.startsWith(QStringLiteral("[cal]"))) {
1210 return;
1211 }
1212
1213 m_statusTextHandler->handleHTMLEscapedTextMessage(static_cast<MAV_COMPONENT>(comp_id), static_cast<MAV_SEVERITY>(severity), text, QString::fromStdString(description));
1214 }
1215 }
1216}
1217
1218EventHandler& Vehicle::_eventHandler(uint8_t compid)
1219{
1220 auto eventData = _events.find(compid);
1221 if (eventData == _events.end()) {
1222 // add new component
1223
1224 auto sendRequestEventMessageCB = [this](const mavlink_request_event_t& msg) {
1225 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
1226 if (sharedLink) {
1227 mavlink_message_t message;
1228 mavlink_msg_request_event_encode_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
1229 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
1230 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
1231 &message,
1232 &msg);
1233 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), message);
1234 }
1235 };
1236
1237 QString profile = "dev"; // TODO: should be configurable
1238
1239 QSharedPointer<EventHandler> eventHandler{new EventHandler(this, profile,
1240 std::bind(&Vehicle::_handleEvent, this, compid, std::placeholders::_1),
1241 sendRequestEventMessageCB,
1242 MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(), MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(), _systemID, compid)};
1243 eventData = _events.insert(compid, eventHandler);
1244
1245 // connect health and arming check updates
1246 connect(eventHandler.data(), &EventHandler::healthAndArmingChecksUpdated, this, [compid, this]() {
1247 const QSharedPointer<EventHandler>& evtHandler = _events[compid];
1248 _healthAndArmingCheckReport.update(compid, evtHandler->healthAndArmingCheckResults(),
1249 evtHandler->getModeGroup(_has_custom_mode_user_intention ? _custom_mode_user_intention : _custom_mode));
1250 });
1251 connect(this, &Vehicle::flightModeChanged, this, [compid, this]() {
1252 const QSharedPointer<EventHandler>& evtHandler = _events[compid];
1253 if (evtHandler->healthAndArmingCheckResultsValid()) {
1254 _healthAndArmingCheckReport.update(compid, evtHandler->healthAndArmingCheckResults(),
1255 evtHandler->getModeGroup(_has_custom_mode_user_intention ? _custom_mode_user_intention : _custom_mode));
1256 }
1257 });
1258 }
1259 return *eventData->data();
1260}
1261
1262void Vehicle::setEventsMetadata(uint8_t compid, const QString& metadataJsonFileName)
1263{
1264 _eventHandler(compid).setMetadata(metadataJsonFileName);
1265
1266 // get the mode group for some well-known flight modes
1267 int modeGroups[2]{-1, -1};
1268 const QString modes[2]{_firmwarePlugin->takeOffFlightMode(), _firmwarePlugin->missionFlightMode()};
1269 for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(modeGroups)/sizeof(modeGroups[0]); ++i) {
1270 uint8_t base_mode;
1271 uint32_t custom_mode;
1272 if (setFlightModeCustom(modes[i], &base_mode, &custom_mode)) {
1273 modeGroups[i] = _eventHandler(compid).getModeGroup(custom_mode);
1274 if (modeGroups[i] == -1) {
1275 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Failed to get mode group for mode" << modes[i] << "(Might not be in metadata)";
1276 }
1277 }
1278 }
1279 _healthAndArmingCheckReport.setModeGroups(modeGroups[0], modeGroups[1]);
1280
1281 // Request arming checks to be reported
1282 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId,
1283 MAV_CMD_RUN_PREARM_CHECKS,
1284 false);
1285}
1286
1287void Vehicle::setActuatorsMetadata([[maybe_unused]] uint8_t compid,
1288 const QString &metadataJsonFileName)
1289{
1290 if (!_actuators) {
1291 _actuators = new Actuators(this, this);
1292 }
1293 _actuators->load(metadataJsonFileName);
1294}
1295
1296void Vehicle::_handleHeartbeat(mavlink_message_t& message)
1297{
1298 if (message.compid != _defaultComponentId) {
1299 return;
1300 }
1301
1302 mavlink_heartbeat_t heartbeat;
1303
1304 mavlink_msg_heartbeat_decode(&message, &heartbeat);
1305
1306 bool newArmed = heartbeat.base_mode & MAV_MODE_FLAG_DECODE_POSITION_SAFETY;
1307
1308 // ArduPilot firmare has a strange case when ARMING_REQUIRE=0. This means the vehicle is always armed but the motors are not
1309 // really powered up until the safety button is pressed. Because of this we can't depend on the heartbeat to tell us the true
1310 // armed (and dangerous) state. We must instead rely on SYS_STATUS telling us that the motors are enabled.
1311 if (apmFirmware()) {
1312 if (!_apmArmingNotRequired() || !(_onboardControlSensorsPresent & MAV_SYS_STATUS_SENSOR_MOTOR_OUTPUTS)) {
1313 // If ARMING_REQUIRE!=0 or we haven't seen motor output status yet we use the hearbeat info for armed
1314 _updateArmed(newArmed);
1315 }
1316 } else {
1317 // Non-ArduPilot always updates from armed state in heartbeat
1318 _updateArmed(newArmed);
1319 }
1320
1321 if (heartbeat.base_mode != _base_mode || heartbeat.custom_mode != _custom_mode) {
1322 QString previousFlightMode;
1323 if (_base_mode != 0 || _custom_mode != 0){
1324 // Vehicle is initialized with _base_mode=0 and _custom_mode=0. Don't pass this to flightMode() since it will complain about
1325 // bad modes while unit testing.
1326 previousFlightMode = flightMode();
1327 }
1328 _base_mode = heartbeat.base_mode;
1329 _custom_mode = heartbeat.custom_mode;
1330 if (previousFlightMode != flightMode()) {
1331 emit flightModeChanged(flightMode());
1332 }
1333 }
1334}
1335
1336void Vehicle::_handleCurrentMode(mavlink_message_t& message)
1337{
1338 mavlink_current_mode_t currentMode;
1339 mavlink_msg_current_mode_decode(&message, &currentMode);
1340 if (currentMode.intended_custom_mode != 0) { // 0 == unknown/not supplied
1341 _has_custom_mode_user_intention = true;
1342 QString previousFlightMode = flightMode();
1343 bool changed = _custom_mode_user_intention != currentMode.intended_custom_mode;
1344 _custom_mode_user_intention = currentMode.intended_custom_mode;
1345 if (changed && previousFlightMode != flightMode()) {
1346 emit flightModeChanged(flightMode());
1347 }
1348 }
1349}
1350
1351void Vehicle::_handleRadioStatus(mavlink_message_t& message)
1352{
1353
1354 //-- Process telemetry status message
1355 mavlink_radio_status_t rstatus;
1356 mavlink_msg_radio_status_decode(&message, &rstatus);
1357
1358 int rssi = rstatus.rssi;
1359 int remrssi = rstatus.remrssi;
1360 int lnoise = (int)(int8_t)rstatus.noise;
1361 int rnoise = (int)(int8_t)rstatus.remnoise;
1362 //-- 3DR Si1k radio needs rssi fields to be converted to dBm
1363 if (message.sysid == '3' && message.compid == 'D') {
1364 /* Per the Si1K datasheet figure 23.25 and SI AN474 code
1365 * samples the relationship between the RSSI register
1366 * and received power is as follows:
1367 *
1368 * 10
1369 * inputPower = rssi * ------ 127
1370 * 19
1371 *
1372 * Additionally limit to the only realistic range [-120,0] dBm
1373 */
1374 rssi = qMin(qMax(qRound(static_cast<qreal>(rssi) / 1.9 - 127.0), - 120), 0);
1375 remrssi = qMin(qMax(qRound(static_cast<qreal>(remrssi) / 1.9 - 127.0), - 120), 0);
1376 } else {
1377 rssi = (int)(int8_t)rstatus.rssi;
1378 remrssi = (int)(int8_t)rstatus.remrssi;
1379 }
1380 //-- Check for changes
1381 if(_telemetryLRSSI != rssi) {
1382 _telemetryLRSSI = rssi;
1383 emit telemetryLRSSIChanged(_telemetryLRSSI);
1384 }
1385 if(_telemetryRRSSI != remrssi) {
1386 _telemetryRRSSI = remrssi;
1387 emit telemetryRRSSIChanged(_telemetryRRSSI);
1388 }
1389 if(_telemetryRXErrors != rstatus.rxerrors) {
1390 _telemetryRXErrors = rstatus.rxerrors;
1391 emit telemetryRXErrorsChanged(_telemetryRXErrors);
1392 }
1393 if(_telemetryFixed != rstatus.fixed) {
1394 _telemetryFixed = rstatus.fixed;
1395 emit telemetryFixedChanged(_telemetryFixed);
1396 }
1397 if(_telemetryTXBuffer != rstatus.txbuf) {
1398 _telemetryTXBuffer = rstatus.txbuf;
1399 emit telemetryTXBufferChanged(_telemetryTXBuffer);
1400 }
1401 if(_telemetryLNoise != lnoise) {
1402 _telemetryLNoise = lnoise;
1403 emit telemetryLNoiseChanged(_telemetryLNoise);
1404 }
1405 if(_telemetryRNoise != rnoise) {
1406 _telemetryRNoise = rnoise;
1407 emit telemetryRNoiseChanged(_telemetryRNoise);
1408 }
1409}
1410
1411void Vehicle::_handleRCChannels(mavlink_message_t& message)
1412{
1413 mavlink_rc_channels_t channels;
1414
1415 mavlink_msg_rc_channels_decode(&message, &channels);
1416
1417 QVector<uint16_t> rawChannelValues({
1418 channels.chan1_raw,
1419 channels.chan2_raw,
1420 channels.chan3_raw,
1421 channels.chan4_raw,
1422 channels.chan5_raw,
1423 channels.chan6_raw,
1424 channels.chan7_raw,
1425 channels.chan8_raw,
1426 channels.chan9_raw,
1427 channels.chan10_raw,
1428 channels.chan11_raw,
1429 channels.chan12_raw,
1430 channels.chan13_raw,
1431 channels.chan14_raw,
1432 channels.chan15_raw,
1433 channels.chan16_raw,
1434 channels.chan17_raw,
1435 channels.chan18_raw,
1436 });
1437
1438 // The internals of radio calibration can ony deal with contiguous channels (other stuff as well!)
1439 int validChannelCount = 0;
1440 int firstUnusedChannelIndex = -1;
1441 for (int i=0; i<rawChannelValues.size(); i++) {
1442 if (rawChannelValues[i] != UINT16_MAX) {
1443 validChannelCount++;
1444 } else if (firstUnusedChannelIndex == -1) {
1445 firstUnusedChannelIndex = i;
1446 }
1447 }
1448 if (firstUnusedChannelIndex != -1 && firstUnusedChannelIndex != validChannelCount) {
1449 qCWarning(VehicleLog) << "Non-contiguous RC channels detected. Not publishing data from RC_CHANNELS.";
1450 return;
1451 }
1452
1453 QVector<int> channelValues(validChannelCount);
1454 for (int channelIndex = 0; channelIndex < validChannelCount; ++channelIndex) {
1455 int channelValue = rawChannelValues[channelIndex];
1456 // Radio cal can only handle pwm values in the 1000:2000 range, so constrain to that
1457 channelValues[channelIndex] = std::min(std::max(channelValue, 1000), 2000);
1458 }
1459
1460 emit remoteControlRSSIChanged(channels.rssi);
1461 emit rcChannelsChanged(channelValues);
1462}
1463
1464bool Vehicle::sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(LinkInterface* link, mavlink_message_t message)
1465{
1466 if (!link->isConnected()) {
1467 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe" << link << "not connected!";
1468 return false;
1469 }
1470
1471 // Give the plugin a chance to adjust
1472 _firmwarePlugin->adjustOutgoingMavlinkMessageThreadSafe(this, link, &message);
1473
1474 // Write message into buffer, prepending start sign
1475 uint8_t buffer[MAVLINK_MAX_PACKET_LEN];
1476 int len = mavlink_msg_to_send_buffer(buffer, &message);
1477
1478 link->writeBytesThreadSafe((const char*)buffer, len);
1479 _messagesSent++;
1480 emit messagesSentChanged();
1481
1482 return true;
1483}
1484
1485int Vehicle::motorCount()
1486{
1487 uint8_t frameType = 0;
1488 if (_vehicleType == MAV_TYPE_SUBMARINE) {
1489 frameType = parameterManager()->getParameter(_compID, "FRAME_CONFIG")->rawValue().toInt();
1490 }
1491 return QGCMAVLink::motorCount(_vehicleType, frameType);
1492}

1494bool Vehicle::coaxialMotors()
1495{

1497}
1498
1499bool Vehicle::xConfigMotors()
1500{
1501 return _firmwarePlugin->multiRotorXConfig(this);
1502}
1503
1504void Vehicle::_activeVehicleChanged(Vehicle *newActiveVehicle)
1505{
1506 _isActiveVehicle = newActiveVehicle == this;
1507}
1508
1509QGeoCoordinate Vehicle::homePosition()
1510{
1511 return _homePosition;
1512}
1513
1514void Vehicle::setArmed(bool armed, bool showError)
1515{
1516 // We specifically use COMMAND_LONG:MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM since it is supported by more flight stacks.
1517 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId,
1518 MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM,
1519 showError,
1520 armed ? 1.0f : 0.0f);
1521}
1522
1523void Vehicle::forceArm(void)
1524{
1525 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId,
1526 MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM,
1527 true, // show error if fails
1528 1.0f, // arm
1529 2989); // force arm
1530}
1531
1532bool Vehicle::flightModeSetAvailable()
1533{
1534 return _firmwarePlugin->isCapable(this, FirmwarePlugin::SetFlightModeCapability);
1535}
1536
1537QStringList Vehicle::flightModes()
1538{
1539 QStringList flightModes = _firmwarePlugin->flightModes(this);
1540 return flightModes;
1541}
1542
1543QString Vehicle::flightMode() const
1544{
1545 return _firmwarePlugin->flightMode(_base_mode, _custom_mode);
1546}
1547
1548bool Vehicle::setFlightModeCustom(const QString& flightMode, uint8_t* base_mode, uint32_t* custom_mode)
1549{
1550 return _firmwarePlugin->setFlightMode(flightMode, base_mode, custom_mode);
1551}
1552
1553void Vehicle::setFlightMode(const QString& flightMode)
1554{
1555 uint8_t base_mode;
1556 uint32_t custom_mode;
1557
1558 if (setFlightModeCustom(flightMode, &base_mode, &custom_mode)) {
1559 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
1560 if (!sharedLink) {
1561 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "setFlightMode: primary link gone!";
1562 return;
1563 }
1564
1565 uint8_t newBaseMode = _base_mode & ~MAV_MODE_FLAG_DECODE_POSITION_CUSTOM_MODE;
1566
1567 // setFlightMode will only set MAV_MODE_FLAG_CUSTOM_MODE_ENABLED in base_mode, we need to move back in the existing
1568 // states.
1569 newBaseMode |= base_mode;
1570
1571 if (_firmwarePlugin->MAV_CMD_DO_SET_MODE_is_supported()) {
1572 sendMavCommand(defaultComponentId(),
1573 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_MODE,
1574 true, // show error if fails
1575 MAV_MODE_FLAG_CUSTOM_MODE_ENABLED,
1576 custom_mode);
1577 } else {
1578 mavlink_message_t msg;
1579 mavlink_msg_set_mode_pack_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
1580 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
1581 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
1582 &msg,
1583 id(),
1584 newBaseMode,
1585 custom_mode);
1586 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
1587 }
1588 } else {
1589 qCWarning(VehicleLog) << "FirmwarePlugin::setFlightMode failed, flightMode:" << flightMode;
1590 }
1591}
1592
1593#if 0
1594QVariantList Vehicle::links() const {
1595 QVariantList ret;
1596
1597 for( const auto &item: _links )
1598 ret << QVariant::fromValue(item);
1599
1600 return ret;
1601}
1602#endif
1603
1604void Vehicle::requestDataStream(MAV_DATA_STREAM stream, uint16_t rate, bool sendMultiple)
1605{
1606 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
1607 if (!sharedLink) {
1608 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "requestDataStream: primary link gone!";
1609 return;
1610 }
1611
1612 mavlink_message_t msg;
1613 mavlink_request_data_stream_t dataStream;
1614
1615 memset(&dataStream, 0, sizeof(dataStream));
1616
1617 dataStream.req_stream_id = stream;
1618 dataStream.req_message_rate = rate;
1619 dataStream.start_stop = 1; // start
1620 dataStream.target_system = id();
1621 dataStream.target_component = _defaultComponentId;
1622
1623 mavlink_msg_request_data_stream_encode_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
1624 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
1625 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
1626 &msg,
1627 &dataStream);
1628
1629 if (sendMultiple) {
1630 // We use sendMessageMultiple since we really want these to make it to the vehicle
1631 sendMessageMultiple(msg);
1632 } else {
1633 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
1634 }
1635}
1636
1637void Vehicle::_sendMessageMultipleNext()
1638{
1639 if (_nextSendMessageMultipleIndex < _sendMessageMultipleList.count()) {
1640 uint32_t msgId = _sendMessageMultipleList[_nextSendMessageMultipleIndex].message.msgid;
1641 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(msgId);
1642 QString msgName = info ? info->name : QString::number(msgId);
1643 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_sendMessageMultipleNext:" << msgName;
1644
1645 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
1646 if (sharedLink) {
1647 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), _sendMessageMultipleList[_nextSendMessageMultipleIndex].message);
1648 }
1649
1650 if (--_sendMessageMultipleList[_nextSendMessageMultipleIndex].retryCount <= 0) {
1651 _sendMessageMultipleList.removeAt(_nextSendMessageMultipleIndex);
1652 } else {
1653 _nextSendMessageMultipleIndex++;
1654 }
1655 }
1656
1657 if (_nextSendMessageMultipleIndex >= _sendMessageMultipleList.count()) {
1658 _nextSendMessageMultipleIndex = 0;
1659 }
1660}
1661
1662void Vehicle::sendMessageMultiple(mavlink_message_t message)
1663{
1664 SendMessageMultipleInfo_t info;
1665
1666 info.message = message;
1667 info.retryCount = _sendMessageMultipleRetries;
1668
1669 _sendMessageMultipleList.append(info);
1670}
1671
1672void Vehicle::_missionManagerError(int errorCode, const QString& errorMsg)
1673{
1674 Q_UNUSED(errorCode);
1675 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Mission transfer failed. Error: %1").arg(errorMsg));
1676}
1677
1678void Vehicle::_geoFenceManagerError(int errorCode, const QString& errorMsg)
1679{
1680 Q_UNUSED(errorCode);
1681 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("GeoFence transfer failed. Error: %1").arg(errorMsg));
1682}
1683
1684void Vehicle::_rallyPointManagerError(int errorCode, const QString& errorMsg)
1685{
1686 Q_UNUSED(errorCode);
1687 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Rally Point transfer failed. Error: %1").arg(errorMsg));
1688}
1689
1690void Vehicle::_clearCameraTriggerPoints()
1691{
1692 _cameraTriggerPoints.clearAndDeleteContents();
1693}
1694
1695void Vehicle::_flightTimerStart()
1696{
1697 _flightTimer.start();
1698 _flightTimeUpdater.start();
1699 _flightDistanceFact.setRawValue(0);
1700 _flightTimeFact.setRawValue(0);
1701}
1702
1703void Vehicle::_flightTimerStop()
1704{
1705 _flightTimeUpdater.stop();
1706}
1707
1708void Vehicle::_updateFlightTime()
1709{
1710 _flightTimeFact.setRawValue((double)_flightTimer.elapsed() / 1000.0);
1711}
1712
1713void Vehicle::_gotProgressUpdate(float progressValue)
1714{
1715 if (sender() != _initialConnectStateMachine && _initialConnectStateMachine->active()) {
1716 return;
1717 }
1718 if (sender() == _initialConnectStateMachine && !_initialConnectStateMachine->active()) {
1719 progressValue = 0.f;
1720 }
1721 _loadProgress = progressValue;
1722 emit loadProgressChanged(progressValue);
1723}
1724
1725void Vehicle::_firstMissionLoadComplete()
1726{
1727 disconnect(_missionManager, &MissionManager::newMissionItemsAvailable, this, &Vehicle::_firstMissionLoadComplete);
1728}
1729
1730void Vehicle::_firstGeoFenceLoadComplete()
1731{
1732 disconnect(_geoFenceManager, &GeoFenceManager::loadComplete, this, &Vehicle::_firstGeoFenceLoadComplete);
1733}
1734
1735void Vehicle::_firstRallyPointLoadComplete()
1736{
1737 disconnect(_rallyPointManager, &RallyPointManager::loadComplete, this, &Vehicle::_firstRallyPointLoadComplete);
1738 _initialPlanRequestComplete = true;
1739 emit initialPlanRequestCompleteChanged(true);
1740}
1741
1742void Vehicle::_parametersReady(bool parametersReady)
1743{
1744 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_parametersReady" << parametersReady;
1745
1746 // Try to set current unix time to the vehicle
1747 _sendQGCTimeToVehicle();
1748 // Send time twice, more likely to get to the vehicle on a noisy link
1749 _sendQGCTimeToVehicle();
1750 if (parametersReady) {
1751 disconnect(_parameterManager, &ParameterManager::parametersReadyChanged, this, &Vehicle::_parametersReady);
1752 _setupAutoDisarmSignalling();
1753 }
1754
1755 _multirotor_speed_limits_available = _firmwarePlugin->mulirotorSpeedLimitsAvailable(this);
1756 _fixed_wing_airspeed_limits_available = _firmwarePlugin->fixedWingAirSpeedLimitsAvailable(this);
1757
1758 emit haveMRSpeedLimChanged();
1759 emit haveFWSpeedLimChanged();
1760}
1761
1762void Vehicle::_sendQGCTimeToVehicle()
1763{
1764 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
1765 if (!sharedLink) {
1766 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_sendQGCTimeToVehicle: primary link gone!";
1767 return;
1768 }
1769
1770 mavlink_message_t msg;
1771 mavlink_system_time_t cmd;
1772
1773 // Timestamp of the master clock in microseconds since UNIX epoch.
1774 cmd.time_unix_usec = QDateTime::currentDateTime().currentMSecsSinceEpoch()*1000;
1775 // Timestamp of the component clock since boot time in milliseconds (Not necessary).
1776 cmd.time_boot_ms = 0;
1777 mavlink_msg_system_time_encode_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
1778 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
1779 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
1780 &msg,
1781 &cmd);
1782
1783 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
1784}
1785
1786void Vehicle::_remoteControlRSSIChanged(uint8_t rssi)
1787{
1788 //-- 0 <= rssi <= 100 - 255 means "invalid/unknown"
1789 if(rssi > 100) { // Anything over 100 doesn't make sense
1790 if(_rcRSSI != 255) {
1791 _rcRSSI = 255;
1792 emit rcRSSIChanged(_rcRSSI);
1793 }
1794 return;
1795 }
1796 //-- Initialize it
1797 if(_rcRSSIstore == 255.) {
1798 _rcRSSIstore = (double)rssi;
1799 }
1800 // Low pass to git rid of jitter
1801 _rcRSSIstore = (_rcRSSIstore * 0.9f) + ((float)rssi * 0.1);
1802 uint8_t filteredRSSI = (uint8_t)ceil(_rcRSSIstore);
1803 if(_rcRSSIstore < 0.1) {
1804 filteredRSSI = 0;
1805 }
1806 if(_rcRSSI != filteredRSSI) {
1807 _rcRSSI = filteredRSSI;
1808 emit rcRSSIChanged(_rcRSSI);
1809 }
1810}
1811
1812void Vehicle::virtualTabletJoystickValue(double roll, double pitch, double yaw, double thrust)
1813{
1814 // The following if statement prevents the virtualTabletJoystick from sending values if the standard joystick is enabled
1815 bool isActiveVehicle = (MultiVehicleManager::instance()->activeVehicle() == this);
1816 bool joystickEnabled = isActiveVehicle && JoystickManager::instance()->activeJoystickEnabledForActiveVehicle();
1817 if (!joystickEnabled) {
1818 sendJoystickDataThreadSafe(
1819 static_cast<float>(roll),
1820 static_cast<float>(pitch),
1821 static_cast<float>(yaw),
1822 static_cast<float>(thrust),
1823 0, 0, // buttons
1824 NAN, NAN, NAN, NAN, NAN, NAN, NAN, NAN); // extension values
1825 }
1826}

1909QString Vehicle::_vehicleIdSpeech()
1910{

1914 return QString();

1918void Vehicle::_handleFlightModeChanged(const QString& flightMode)
1919{
1920 _say(tr("%1 %2 flight mode").arg(_vehicleIdSpeech()).arg(flightMode));
1921 emit guidedModeChanged(_firmwarePlugin->isGuidedMode(this));
1922}
1923
1924void Vehicle::_announceArmedChanged(bool armed)
1925{
1926 _say(QString("%1 %2").arg(_vehicleIdSpeech()).arg(armed ? tr("armed") : tr("disarmed")));
1927 if(armed) {
1928 //-- Keep track of armed coordinates
1929 _armedPosition = _coordinate;
1930 emit armedPositionChanged();
1931 }
1932}
1933
1934void Vehicle::_setFlying(bool flying)
1935{
1936 if (_flying != flying) {
1937 _flying = flying;
1938 emit flyingChanged(flying);
1939 }

1941
1942void Vehicle::_setLanding(bool landing)
1943{

1945 _landing = landing;
1946 emit landingChanged(landing);
1947 }

2055void Vehicle::guidedModeGotoLocation(const QGeoCoordinate& gotoCoord, double forwardFlightLoiterRadius)
2056{
2057 if (!guidedModeSupported()) {
2058 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(guided_mode_not_supported_by_vehicle);
2059 return;
2060 }
2061 if (!coordinate().isValid()) {
2062 return;
2063 }
2064 double maxDistance = SettingsManager::instance()->flyViewSettings()->maxGoToLocationDistance()->rawValue().toDouble();
2065 if (coordinate().distanceTo(gotoCoord) > maxDistance) {
2066 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(QString("New location is too far. Must be less than %1 %2.").arg(qRound(FactMetaData::metersToAppSettingsHorizontalDistanceUnits(maxDistance).toDouble())).arg(FactMetaData::appSettingsHorizontalDistanceUnitsString()));
2067 return;
2068 }
2069 _firmwarePlugin->guidedModeGotoLocation(this, gotoCoord, forwardFlightLoiterRadius);
2070}
2071

2073{
2074 if (!guidedModeSupported()) {

2076 return;
2077 }
2078 _firmwarePlugin->guidedModeChangeAltitude(this, altitudeChange, pauseVehicle);
2079}

2100
2101void Vehicle::guidedModeOrbit(const QGeoCoordinate& centerCoord, double radius, double amslAltitude)
2102{
2103 if (!orbitModeSupported()) {
2104 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(QStringLiteral("Orbit mode not supported by Vehicle."));
2105 return;
2106 }
2107 if (capabilityBits() & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_COMMAND_INT) {
2108 sendMavCommandInt(
2109 defaultComponentId(),
2110 MAV_CMD_DO_ORBIT,
2111 MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL,
2112 true, // show error if fails
2113 static_cast<float>(radius),
2114 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Use default velocity
2115 static_cast<float>(ORBIT_YAW_BEHAVIOUR_UNCHANGED), // Use current or vehicle default yaw behavior
2116 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Use vehicle default num of orbits behavior
2117 centerCoord.latitude(), centerCoord.longitude(), static_cast<float>(amslAltitude));
2118 } else {
2119 sendMavCommand(
2120 defaultComponentId(),
2121 MAV_CMD_DO_ORBIT,
2122 true, // show error if fails
2123 static_cast<float>(radius),
2124 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Use default velocity
2125 static_cast<float>(ORBIT_YAW_BEHAVIOUR_UNCHANGED), // Use current or vehicle default yaw behavior
2126 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Use vehicle default num of orbits behavior
2127 static_cast<float>(centerCoord.latitude()),
2128 static_cast<float>(centerCoord.longitude()),
2129 static_cast<float>(amslAltitude));
2130 }
2131}
2132
2133void Vehicle::guidedModeROI(const QGeoCoordinate& centerCoord)
2134{
2135 if (!centerCoord.isValid()) {
2136 return;
2137 }
2138 if (!roiModeSupported()) {
2139 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(QStringLiteral("ROI mode not supported by Vehicle."));
2140 return;
2141 }
2142
2143 if (px4Firmware()) {
2144 // PX4 ignores the coordinate frame in COMMAND_INT and treats the altitude as AMSL.
2145 // The map click provides no altitude, so we query terrain to get a proper AMSL altitude.
2146 if (_roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery) {
2147 disconnect(_roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery, &TerrainAtCoordinateQuery::terrainDataReceived, this, &Vehicle::_roiTerrainReceived);
2148 _roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = nullptr;
2149 }
2150
2151 _roiCoordinate = centerCoord;
2152
2153 _roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = new TerrainAtCoordinateQuery(true /* autoDelete */);
2154 connect(_roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery, &TerrainAtCoordinateQuery::terrainDataReceived, this, &Vehicle::_roiTerrainReceived);
2155 QList<QGeoCoordinate> rgCoord;
2156 rgCoord.append(centerCoord);
2157 _roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery->requestData(rgCoord);
2158 } else {
2159 // ArduPilot handles MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL_RELATIVE_ALT correctly, so altitude 0 relative to
2160 // home is a reasonable default for a map click with no altitude info.
2161 // Sanity check Ardupilot. Max altitude processed is 83000
2162 if ((centerCoord.altitude() >= 83000) || (centerCoord.altitude() <= -83000)) {
2163 return;
2164 }
2165 _sendROICommand(centerCoord, MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL_RELATIVE_ALT, static_cast<float>(centerCoord.altitude()));
2166 }
2167
2168 // This is picked by qml to display coordinate over map
2169 emit roiCoordChanged(centerCoord);
2170}
2171
2172void Vehicle::_roiTerrainReceived(bool success, QList<double> heights)
2173{
2174 _roiTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = nullptr;
2175
2176 if (!_roiCoordinate.isValid()) {
2177 return;
2178 }
2179
2180 float roiAltitude;
2181 if (success) {
2182 roiAltitude = static_cast<float>(heights[0]);
2183 } else {
2184 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_roiTerrainReceived: terrain query failed, falling back to home altitude";
2185 roiAltitude = static_cast<float>(_homePosition.altitude());
2186 }
2187
2188 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "guidedModeROI: lat" << _roiCoordinate.latitude() << "lon" << _roiCoordinate.longitude() << "terrainAltAMSL" << roiAltitude << "success" << success;
2189
2190 _sendROICommand(_roiCoordinate, MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL, roiAltitude);
2191
2192 _roiCoordinate = QGeoCoordinate();
2193}
2194
2195void Vehicle::_sendROICommand(const QGeoCoordinate& coord, MAV_FRAME frame, float altitude)
2196{
2197 if (capabilityBits() & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_COMMAND_INT) {
2198 sendMavCommandInt(
2199 defaultComponentId(),
2200 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_ROI_LOCATION,
2201 frame,
2202 true, // show error if fails
2203 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2204 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2205 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2206 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2207 coord.latitude(),
2208 coord.longitude(),
2209 altitude);
2210 } else {
2211 sendMavCommand(
2212 defaultComponentId(),
2213 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_ROI_LOCATION,
2214 true, // show error if fails
2215 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2216 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2217 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2218 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2219 static_cast<float>(coord.latitude()),
2220 static_cast<float>(coord.longitude()),
2221 altitude);
2222 }
2223}
2224
2225void Vehicle::stopGuidedModeROI()
2226{
2227 if (!roiModeSupported()) {
2228 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(QStringLiteral("ROI mode not supported by Vehicle."));
2229 return;
2230 }
2231 if (capabilityBits() & MAV_PROTOCOL_CAPABILITY_COMMAND_INT) {
2232 sendMavCommandInt(
2233 defaultComponentId(),
2234 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_ROI_NONE,
2235 MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL,
2236 true, // show error if fails
2237 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2238 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2239 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2240 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2241 static_cast<double>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2242 static_cast<double>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2243 static_cast<float>(qQNaN())); // Empty
2244 } else {
2245 sendMavCommand(
2246 defaultComponentId(),
2247 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_ROI_NONE,
2248 true, // show error if fails
2249 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2250 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2251 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2252 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2253 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2254 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()), // Empty
2255 static_cast<float>(qQNaN())); // Empty
2256 }
2257}
