2302
2303void Vehicle::emergencyStop()
2304{
2305 sendMavCommand(
2306 _defaultComponentId,
2307 MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM,
2308 true, // show error if fails
2309 0.0f,
2310 21196.0f); // Magic number for emergency stop
2311}
2312
2313void Vehicle::landingGearDeploy()
2314{
2315 sendMavCommand(
2316 defaultComponentId(),
2317 MAV_CMD_AIRFRAME_CONFIGURATION,
2318 true, // show error if fails
2319 -1.0f, // all gears
2320 0.0f); // down
2321}
2322
2323void Vehicle::landingGearRetract()
2324{
2325 sendMavCommand(
2326 defaultComponentId(),
2327 MAV_CMD_AIRFRAME_CONFIGURATION,
2328 true, // show error if fails
2329 -1.0f, // all gears
2330 1.0f); // up
2331}
2332
2333void Vehicle::setCurrentMissionSequence(int seq)
2334{
2335 if (!_firmwarePlugin->sendHomePositionToVehicle()) {
2336 seq--;
2337 }
2338
2339 // send the mavlink command (created in Jan 2019)
2340 sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallback(
2341 [this,seq]() { // lambda function which uses the deprecated mission_set_current
2342 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
2343 if (!sharedLink) {
2344 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "setCurrentMissionSequence: primary link gone!";
2345 return;
2346 }
2347
2348 mavlink_message_t msg;
2349
2350 // send mavlink message (deprecated since Aug 2022).
2351 mavlink_msg_mission_set_current_pack_chan(
2352 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId()),
2353 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId()),
2354 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
2355 &msg,
2356 static_cast<uint8_t>(id()),
2357 _compID,
2358 static_cast<uint16_t>(seq));
2359 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
2360 },
2361 static_cast<uint8_t>(defaultComponentId()),
2362 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_MISSION_CURRENT,
2363 true, // showError
2364 static_cast<uint16_t>(seq)
2365 );
2366}
2367
2368void Vehicle::sendMavCommand(int compId, MAV_CMD command, bool showError, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, float param5, float param6, float param7)
2369{
2370 _sendMavCommandWorker(false, // commandInt
2371 showError,
2372 nullptr, // no handlers
2373 compId,
2374 command,
2375 MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL,
2376 param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7);
2377}
2378
2379void Vehicle::sendMavCommandDelayed(int compId, MAV_CMD command, bool showError, int milliseconds, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, float param5, float param6, float param7)
2380{
2381 QTimer::singleShot(milliseconds, this, [=, this] { sendMavCommand(compId, command, showError, param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7); });
2382}
2383
2384void Vehicle::sendCommand(int compId, int command, bool showError, double param1, double param2, double param3, double param4, double param5, double param6, double param7)
2385{
2386 sendMavCommand(
2387 compId, static_cast<MAV_CMD>(command),
2388 showError,
2389 static_cast<float>(param1),
2390 static_cast<float>(param2),
2391 static_cast<float>(param3),
2392 static_cast<float>(param4),
2393 static_cast<float>(param5),
2394 static_cast<float>(param6),
2395 static_cast<float>(param7));
2396}
2397
2398void Vehicle::sendMavCommandWithHandler(const MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t* ackHandlerInfo, int compId, MAV_CMD command, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, float param5, float param6, float param7)
2399{
2400 _sendMavCommandWorker(false, // commandInt
2401 false, // showError
2402 ackHandlerInfo,
2403 compId,
2404 command,
2405 MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL,
2406 param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7);
2407}
2408
2409void Vehicle::sendMavCommandInt(int compId, MAV_CMD command, MAV_FRAME frame, bool showError, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, double param5, double param6, float param7)
2410{
2411 _sendMavCommandWorker(true, // commandInt
2412 showError,
2413 nullptr, // no handlers
2414 compId,
2415 command,
2416 frame,
2417 param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7);
2418}
2419
2420void Vehicle::sendMavCommandIntWithHandler(const MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t* ackHandlerInfo, int compId, MAV_CMD command, MAV_FRAME frame, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, double param5, double param6, float param7)
2421{
2422 _sendMavCommandWorker(true, // commandInt
2423 false, // showError
2424 ackHandlerInfo,
2425 compId,
2426 command,
2427 frame,
2428 param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7);
2429}
2430
2431typedef struct {
2432 Vehicle* vehicle;
2433 bool showError;
2434 std::function<void()> unsupported_lambda;
2435} _sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallbackHandlerData;
2436
2437static void _sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallbackHandler(void* resultHandlerData, int /*compId*/, const mavlink_command_ack_t& ack, Vehicle::MavCmdResultFailureCode_t /*failureCode*/)
2438{
2439 auto* data = (_sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallbackHandlerData*)resultHandlerData;
2440 auto* vehicle = data->vehicle;
2441 auto* instanceData = vehicle->firmwarePluginInstanceData();
2442
2443 switch (ack.result) {
2444 case MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED:
2445 instanceData->setCommandSupported(MAV_CMD(ack.command), FirmwarePluginInstanceData::CommandSupportedResult::SUPPORTED);
2446 break;
2447 case MAV_RESULT_UNSUPPORTED:
2448 instanceData->setCommandSupported(MAV_CMD(ack.command), FirmwarePluginInstanceData::CommandSupportedResult::UNSUPPORTED);
2449 // call the "unsupported" lambda:
2450 data->unsupported_lambda();
2451 break;
2452 default:
2453 if (data->showError) {
2454 Vehicle::showCommandAckError(ack);
2455 }
2456 break;
2457 };
2458
2459 delete data;
2460}
2461
2462void Vehicle::sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallback(std::function<void()> lambda, int compId, MAV_CMD command, bool showError, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, float param5, float param6, float param7)
2463{
2464
2465 auto* instanceData = firmwarePluginInstanceData();
2466
2467 switch (instanceData->getCommandSupported(command)) {
2468 case FirmwarePluginInstanceData::CommandSupportedResult::UNSUPPORTED:
2469 // command is defintely unsupported, so call the lambda function:
2470 lambda();
2471 break;
2472 case FirmwarePluginInstanceData::CommandSupportedResult::SUPPORTED:
2473 // command is definitely supported; just send the command normally:
2474 sendMavCommand(
2475 compId,
2476 command,
2477 showError,
2478 param1,
2479 param2,
2480 param3,
2481 param4,
2482 param5,
2483 param6,
2484 param7
2485 );
2486 break;
2487 case FirmwarePluginInstanceData::CommandSupportedResult::UNKNOWN: {
2488 // unknown whether the command is supported; send the command
2489 // and let the callback handler call the lambda function if
2490 // the command is not supported:
2491 auto *data = new _sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallbackHandlerData();
2492 data->vehicle = this;
2493 data->showError = showError;
2494 data->unsupported_lambda = lambda;
2495
2496 const MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t handlerInfo {
2497 /* .resultHandler = */ &_sendMavCommandWithLambdaFallbackHandler,
2498 /* .resultHandlerData = */ data,
2499 /* .progressHandler = */ nullptr,
2500 /* .progressHandlerData = */ nullptr
2501 };
2502 sendMavCommandWithHandler(
2503 &handlerInfo,
2504 compId,
2505 command,
2506 param1,
2507 param2,
2508 param3,
2509 param4,
2510 param5,
2511 param6,
2512 param7
2513 );
2514 break;
2515 }
2516 }
2517}
2518
2519bool Vehicle::isMavCommandPending(int targetCompId, MAV_CMD command)
2520{
2521 bool pending = ((-1) < _findMavCommandListEntryIndex(targetCompId, command));
2522 // qDebug() << "Pending target: " << targetCompId << ", command: " << (int)command << ", pending: " << (pending ? "yes" : "no");
2523 return pending;
2524}
2525
2526int Vehicle::_findMavCommandListEntryIndex(int targetCompId, MAV_CMD command)
2527{
2528 for (int i=0; i<_mavCommandList.count(); i++) {
2529 const MavCommandListEntry_t& entry = _mavCommandList[i];
2530 if (entry.targetCompId == targetCompId && entry.command == command) {
2531 return i;
2532 }
2533 }
2534
2535 return -1;
2536}
2537
2538int Vehicle::_mavCommandResponseCheckTimeoutMSecs()
2539{
2540 // Use shorter check interval during unit tests for faster test execution
2541 return qgcApp()->runningUnitTests() ? 50 : 500;
2542}
2543
2544int Vehicle::_mavCommandAckTimeoutMSecs()
2545{
2546 // Use shorter ack timeout during unit tests for faster test execution
2547 return qgcApp()->runningUnitTests() ? kTestMavCommandAckTimeoutMs : 3000;
2548}
2549
2550bool Vehicle::_sendMavCommandShouldRetry(MAV_CMD command)
2551{
2552 switch (command) {
2553#ifdef QT_DEBUG
2554 // These MockLink command should be retried so we can create unit tests to test retry code
2555 case MockLink::MAV_CMD_MOCKLINK_ALWAYS_RESULT_ACCEPTED:
2556 case MockLink::MAV_CMD_MOCKLINK_ALWAYS_RESULT_FAILED:
2557 case MockLink::MAV_CMD_MOCKLINK_SECOND_ATTEMPT_RESULT_ACCEPTED:
2558 case MockLink::MAV_CMD_MOCKLINK_SECOND_ATTEMPT_RESULT_FAILED:
2559 case MockLink::MAV_CMD_MOCKLINK_NO_RESPONSE:
2560 return true;
2561#endif
2562
2563 // In general we should not retry any commands. This is for safety reasons. For example you don't want an ARM command
2564 // to timeout with no response over a noisy link twice and then suddenly have the third try work 6 seconds later. At that
2565 // point the user could have walked up to the vehicle to see what is going wrong.
2566 //
2567 // We do retry commands which are part of the initial vehicle connect sequence. This makes this process work better over noisy
2568 // links where commands could be lost. Also these commands tend to just be requesting status so if they end up being delayed
2569 // there are no safety concerns that could occur.
2570 case MAV_CMD_REQUEST_AUTOPILOT_CAPABILITIES:
2571 case MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE:
2572 case MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_STORAGE:
2573 case MAV_CMD_RUN_PREARM_CHECKS:
2574 return true;
2575
2576 default:
2577 return false;
2578 }
2579}
2580
2581bool Vehicle::_commandCanBeDuplicated(MAV_CMD command)
2582{
2583 // For some commands we don't care about response as much as we care about sending them regularly.
2584 // This test avoids commands not being sent due to an ACK not being received yet.
2585 // MOTOR_TEST in ardusub is a case where we need a constant stream of commands so it doesn't time out.
2586 switch (command) {
2587 case MAV_CMD_DO_MOTOR_TEST:
2588 return true;
2589 case MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL:
2590 return true;
2591 default:
2592 return false;
2593 }
2594}
2595
2596void Vehicle::_sendMavCommandWorker(
2597 bool commandInt,
2598 bool showError,
2599 const MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t* ackHandlerInfo,
2600 int targetCompId,
2601 MAV_CMD command,
2602 MAV_FRAME frame,
2603 float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, double param5, double param6, float param7)
2604{
2605 // We can't send commands to compIdAll using this method. The reason being that we would get responses back possibly from multiple components
2606 // which this code can't handle.
2607 // We also can't send the majority of commands again if we are already waiting for a response from that same command. If we did that we would not be able to discern
2608 // which ack was associated with which command.
2609 if ((targetCompId == MAV_COMP_ID_ALL) || (isMavCommandPending(targetCompId, command) && !_commandCanBeDuplicated(command))) {
2610 bool compIdAll = targetCompId == MAV_COMP_ID_ALL;
2611 QString rawCommandName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->rawName(command);
2612
2613 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QStringLiteral("_sendMavCommandWorker failing %1").arg(compIdAll ? "MAV_COMP_ID_ALL not supported" : "duplicate command") << rawCommandName << param1 << param2 << param3 << param4 << param5 << param6 << param7;
2614
2615 MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode = compIdAll ? MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly : MavCmdResultFailureDuplicateCommand;
2616 if (ackHandlerInfo && ackHandlerInfo->resultHandler) {
2617 mavlink_command_ack_t ack = {};
2618 ack.result = MAV_RESULT_FAILED;
2619 (*ackHandlerInfo->resultHandler)(ackHandlerInfo->resultHandlerData, targetCompId, ack, failureCode);
2620 } else {
2621 emit mavCommandResult(_systemID, targetCompId, command, MAV_RESULT_FAILED, failureCode);
2622 }
2623 if (showError) {
2624 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Unable to send command: %1.").arg(compIdAll ? tr("Internal error - MAV_COMP_ID_ALL not supported") : tr("Waiting on previous response to same command.")));
2625 }
2626
2627 return;
2628 }
2629
2630 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
2631 if (!sharedLink) {
2632 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_sendMavCommandWorker: primary link gone!";
2633
2634 const MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode = MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand;
2635 if (ackHandlerInfo && ackHandlerInfo->resultHandler) {
2636 mavlink_command_ack_t ack = {};
2637 ack.command = command;
2638 ack.result = MAV_RESULT_FAILED;
2639 (*ackHandlerInfo->resultHandler)(ackHandlerInfo->resultHandlerData, targetCompId, ack, failureCode);
2640 } else {
2641 emit mavCommandResult(_systemID, targetCompId, command, MAV_RESULT_FAILED, failureCode);
2642 }
2643
2644 if (showError) {
2645 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Unable to send command: Vehicle is not connected."));
2646 }
2647 return;
2648 }
2649
2650 MavCommandListEntry_t entry;
2651
2652 entry.useCommandInt = commandInt;
2653 entry.targetCompId = targetCompId;
2654 entry.command = command;
2655 entry.frame = frame;
2656 entry.showError = showError;
2657 entry.ackHandlerInfo = {};
2658 if (ackHandlerInfo) {
2659 entry.ackHandlerInfo = *ackHandlerInfo;
2660 }
2661 entry.rgParam1 = param1;
2662 entry.rgParam2 = param2;
2663 entry.rgParam3 = param3;
2664 entry.rgParam4 = param4;
2665 entry.rgParam5 = param5;
2666 entry.rgParam6 = param6;
2667 entry.rgParam7 = param7;
2668 entry.maxTries = _sendMavCommandShouldRetry(command) ? _mavCommandMaxRetryCount : 1;
2669 entry.ackTimeoutMSecs = sharedLink->linkConfiguration()->isHighLatency() ? _mavCommandAckTimeoutMSecsHighLatency : _mavCommandAckTimeoutMSecs();
2670 entry.elapsedTimer.start();
2671
2672 QString commandStr = _formatMavCommand(command, param1);
2673 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Sending" << commandStr << "param1-7:" << command << param1 << param2 << param3 << param4 << param5 << param6 << param7;
2674
2675 _mavCommandList.append(entry);
2676 _sendMavCommandFromList(_mavCommandList.count() - 1);
2677}
2678
2679void Vehicle::_sendMavCommandFromList(int index)
2680{
2681 MavCommandListEntry_t commandEntry = _mavCommandList[index];
2682
2683 QString rawCommandName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->rawName(commandEntry.command);
2684 QString friendlyName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->friendlyName(commandEntry.command);
2685
2686 if (++_mavCommandList[index].tryCount > commandEntry.maxTries) {
2687 QString logMsg = QStringLiteral("Giving up sending command after max retries: %1").arg(rawCommandName);
2688
2689 // For REQUEST_MESSAGE commands, also log which message was being requested
2690 if (commandEntry.command == MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE) {
2691 int requestedMsgId = static_cast<int>(commandEntry.rgParam1);
2692 const mavlink_message_info_t *info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(requestedMsgId);
2693 logMsg += QStringLiteral(" requesting: %1").arg(info->name);
2694 }
2695
2696 qCWarning(VehicleLog) << logMsg;
2697
2698 _mavCommandList.removeAt(index);
2699 if (commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.resultHandler) {
2700 mavlink_command_ack_t ack = {};
2701 ack.result = MAV_RESULT_FAILED;
2702 (*commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.resultHandler)(commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.resultHandlerData, commandEntry.targetCompId, ack, MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand);
2703 } else {
2704 emit mavCommandResult(_systemID, commandEntry.targetCompId, commandEntry.command, MAV_RESULT_FAILED, MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand);
2705 }
2706 if (commandEntry.showError) {
2707 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Vehicle did not respond to command: %1").arg(friendlyName));
2708 }
2709 return;
2710 }
2711
2712 if (commandEntry.tryCount > 1 && !px4Firmware() && commandEntry.command == MAV_CMD_START_RX_PAIR) {
2713 // The implementation of this command comes from the IO layer and is shared across stacks. So for other firmwares
2714 // we aren't really sure whether they are correct or not.
2715 return;
2716 }
2717
2718 QString commandStr = _formatMavCommand(commandEntry.command, commandEntry.rgParam1);
2719 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Sending" << commandStr << "tryCount:param1-7" << commandEntry.tryCount << commandEntry.rgParam1 << commandEntry.rgParam2 << commandEntry.rgParam3 << commandEntry.rgParam4 << commandEntry.rgParam5 << commandEntry.rgParam6 << commandEntry.rgParam7;
2720
2721 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
2722 if (!sharedLink) {
2723 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_sendMavCommandFromList: primary link gone!";
2724 return;
2725 }
2726
2727 mavlink_message_t msg;
2728
2729 if (commandEntry.useCommandInt) {
2730 mavlink_command_int_t cmd;
2731
2732 memset(&cmd, 0, sizeof(cmd));
2733 cmd.target_system = _systemID;
2734 cmd.target_component = commandEntry.targetCompId;
2735 cmd.command = commandEntry.command;
2736 cmd.frame = commandEntry.frame;
2737 cmd.param1 = commandEntry.rgParam1;
2738 cmd.param2 = commandEntry.rgParam2;
2739 cmd.param3 = commandEntry.rgParam3;
2740 cmd.param4 = commandEntry.rgParam4;
2741 cmd.x = commandEntry.frame == MAV_FRAME_MISSION ? commandEntry.rgParam5 : commandEntry.rgParam5 * 1e7;
2742 cmd.y = commandEntry.frame == MAV_FRAME_MISSION ? commandEntry.rgParam6 : commandEntry.rgParam6 * 1e7;
2743 cmd.z = commandEntry.rgParam7;
2744 mavlink_msg_command_int_encode_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
2745 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
2746 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
2747 &msg,
2748 &cmd);
2749 } else {
2750 mavlink_command_long_t cmd;
2751
2752 memset(&cmd, 0, sizeof(cmd));
2753 cmd.target_system = _systemID;
2754 cmd.target_component = commandEntry.targetCompId;
2755 cmd.command = commandEntry.command;
2756 cmd.confirmation = 0;
2757 cmd.param1 = commandEntry.rgParam1;
2758 cmd.param2 = commandEntry.rgParam2;
2759 cmd.param3 = commandEntry.rgParam3;
2760 cmd.param4 = commandEntry.rgParam4;
2761 cmd.param5 = static_cast<float>(commandEntry.rgParam5);
2762 cmd.param6 = static_cast<float>(commandEntry.rgParam6);
2763 cmd.param7 = commandEntry.rgParam7;
2764 mavlink_msg_command_long_encode_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
2765 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
2766 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
2767 &msg,
2768 &cmd);
2769 }
2770
2771 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
2772}
2773
2774void Vehicle::_sendMavCommandResponseTimeoutCheck(void)
2775{
2776 if (_mavCommandList.isEmpty()) {
2777 return;
2778 }
2779
2780 // Walk the list backwards since _sendMavCommandFromList can remove entries
2781 for (int i=_mavCommandList.count()-1; i>=0; i--) {
2782 MavCommandListEntry_t& commandEntry = _mavCommandList[i];
2783 if (commandEntry.elapsedTimer.elapsed() > commandEntry.ackTimeoutMSecs) {
2784 // Try sending command again
2785 _sendMavCommandFromList(i);
2786 }
2787 }
2788}
2789
2790void Vehicle::showCommandAckError(const mavlink_command_ack_t& ack)
2791{
2792 QString rawName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->rawName(static_cast<MAV_CMD>(ack.command));
2793 QString friendlyName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->friendlyName(static_cast<MAV_CMD>(ack.command));
2794 QString commandStr;
2795
2796 if (friendlyName.isEmpty()) {
2797 commandStr = rawName;
2798 } else {
2799 commandStr = QStringLiteral("%1 (%2)").arg(friendlyName).arg(rawName);
2800 }
2801
2802 switch (ack.result) {
2803 case MAV_RESULT_TEMPORARILY_REJECTED:
2804 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("%1 command temporarily rejected").arg(commandStr));
2805 break;
2806 case MAV_RESULT_DENIED:
2807 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("%1 command denied").arg(commandStr));
2808 break;
2809 case MAV_RESULT_UNSUPPORTED:
2810 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("%1 command not supported").arg(commandStr));
2811 break;
2812 case MAV_RESULT_FAILED:
2813 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("%1 command failed").arg(commandStr));
2814 break;
2815 default:
2816 // Do nothing
2817 break;
2818 }
2819}
2820
2821void Vehicle::_handleCommandAck(mavlink_message_t& message)
2822{
2823 mavlink_command_ack_t ack;
2824 mavlink_msg_command_ack_decode(&message, &ack);
2825
2826 QString rawCommandName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->rawName(static_cast<MAV_CMD>(ack.command));
2827 QString logMsg = QStringLiteral("_handleCommandAck command(%1) result(%2)").arg(rawCommandName).arg(QGCMAVLink::mavResultToString(static_cast<MAV_RESULT>(ack.result)));
2828
2829 // For REQUEST_MESSAGE commands, also log which message was requested
2830 if (ack.command == MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE) {
2831 int entryIndex = _findMavCommandListEntryIndex(message.compid, static_cast<MAV_CMD>(ack.command));
2832 if (entryIndex != -1) {
2833 int requestedMsgId = static_cast<int>(_mavCommandList[entryIndex].rgParam1);
2834 const mavlink_message_info_t *info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(requestedMsgId);
2835 QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(requestedMsgId);
2836 logMsg += QStringLiteral(" msgId(%1)").arg(msgName);
2837 }
2838 }
2839
2840 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << logMsg;
2841
2842 if (ack.command == MAV_CMD_DO_SET_ROI_LOCATION) {
2843 if (ack.result == MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) {
2844 _isROIEnabled = true;
2845 emit isROIEnabledChanged();
2846 }
2847 }
2848
2849 if (ack.command == MAV_CMD_DO_SET_ROI_NONE) {
2850 if (ack.result == MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) {
2851 _isROIEnabled = false;
2852 emit isROIEnabledChanged();
2853 }
2854 }
2855
2856 if (ack.command == MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_STORAGE) {
2857 auto result = (ack.result == MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED);
2858 emit sensorsParametersResetAck(result);
2859 }
2860
2861#if !defined(QGC_NO_ARDUPILOT_DIALECT)
2862 if (ack.command == MAV_CMD_FLASH_BOOTLOADER && ack.result == MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) {
2863 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Bootloader flash succeeded"));
2864 }
2865#endif
2866
2867 int entryIndex = _findMavCommandListEntryIndex(message.compid, static_cast<MAV_CMD>(ack.command));
2868 if (entryIndex != -1) {
2869 if (ack.result == MAV_RESULT_IN_PROGRESS) {
2870 MavCommandListEntry_t commandEntry;
2871 if (px4Firmware() && ack.command == MAV_CMD_DO_AUTOTUNE_ENABLE) {
2872 // HacK to support PX4 autotune which does not send final result ack and just sends in progress
2873 commandEntry = _mavCommandList.takeAt(entryIndex);
2874 } else {
2875 // Command has not completed yet, don't remove
2876 MavCommandListEntry_t& commandEntryRef = _mavCommandList[entryIndex];
2877 commandEntryRef.maxTries = 1; // Vehicle responsed to command so don't retry
2878 commandEntryRef.elapsedTimer.start(); // We've heard from vehicle, restart elapsed timer for no ack received timeout
2879 commandEntry = commandEntryRef;
2880 }
2881
2882 if (commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.progressHandler) {
2883 (*commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.progressHandler)(commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.progressHandlerData, message.compid, ack);
2884 }
2885 } else {
2886 MavCommandListEntry_t commandEntry = _mavCommandList.takeAt(entryIndex);
2887
2888 if (commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.resultHandler) {
2889 (*commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.resultHandler)(commandEntry.ackHandlerInfo.resultHandlerData, message.compid, ack, MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly);
2890 } else {
2891 if (commandEntry.showError) {
2892 showCommandAckError(ack);
2893 }
2894 emit mavCommandResult(_systemID, message.compid, ack.command, ack.result, MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly);
2895 }
2896 }
2897 } else {
2898 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_handleCommandAck Ack not in list" << rawCommandName;
2899 }
2900
2901 // advance PID tuning setup/teardown
2902 if (ack.command == MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL) {
2903 _mavlinkStreamConfig.gotSetMessageIntervalAck();
2904 }
2905}
2906
2907void Vehicle::_removeRequestMessageInfo(int compId, int msgId)
2908{
2909 if (_requestMessageInfoMap.contains(compId) && _requestMessageInfoMap[compId].contains(msgId)) {
2910 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(msgId);
2911 const QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(msgId);
2912
2913 delete _requestMessageInfoMap[compId][msgId];
2914 _requestMessageInfoMap[compId].remove(msgId);
2915 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
2916 << "removed active request compId:msgId"
2917 << compId
2918 << msgName
2919 << "remainingActive"
2920 << _requestMessageInfoMap[compId].count();
2921 if (_requestMessageInfoMap[compId].isEmpty()) {
2922 _requestMessageInfoMap.remove(compId);
2923 }
2924 _requestMessageSendNextFromQueue(compId);
2925 } else {
2926 qWarning() << "compId:msgId not found" << compId << msgId;
2927 }
2928}
2929
2930bool Vehicle::_requestMessageDuplicate(int compId, int msgId) const
2931{
2932 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(msgId);
2933 const QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(msgId);
2934
2935 if (_requestMessageInfoMap.contains(compId) && _requestMessageInfoMap[compId].contains(msgId)) {
2936 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "duplicate in active map - compId:msgId" << compId << msgName;
2937 return true;
2938 }
2939
2940 if (_requestMessageQueueMap.contains(compId)) {
2941 for (const RequestMessageInfo_t* requestMessageInfo : _requestMessageQueueMap[compId]) {
2942 if (requestMessageInfo->msgId == msgId) {
2943 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "duplicate in queue - compId:msgId" << compId << msgName;
2944 return true;
2945 }
2946 }
2947 }
2948
2949 return false;
2950}
2951
2952void Vehicle::_requestMessageSendNow(RequestMessageInfo_t* requestMessageInfo)
2953{
2954 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
2955 const QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
2956
2957 _requestMessageInfoMap[requestMessageInfo->compId][requestMessageInfo->msgId] = requestMessageInfo;
2958
2959 const int queueDepth = _requestMessageQueueMap.contains(requestMessageInfo->compId)
2960 ? _requestMessageQueueMap[requestMessageInfo->compId].count()
2961 : 0;
2962 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
2963 << "sending now compId:msgId"
2964 << requestMessageInfo->compId
2965 << msgName
2966 << "queueDepth"
2967 << queueDepth;
2968
2969 Vehicle::MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t handlerInfo;
2970 handlerInfo.resultHandler = _requestMessageCmdResultHandler;
2971 handlerInfo.resultHandlerData = requestMessageInfo;
2972
2973 _sendMavCommandWorker(false, // commandInt
2974 false, // showError
2975 &handlerInfo,
2976 requestMessageInfo->compId,
2977 MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE,
2978 MAV_FRAME_GLOBAL,
2979 requestMessageInfo->msgId,
2980 requestMessageInfo->param1,
2981 requestMessageInfo->param2,
2982 requestMessageInfo->param3,
2983 requestMessageInfo->param4,
2984 requestMessageInfo->param5,
2985 0);
2986}
2987
2988void Vehicle::_requestMessageSendNextFromQueue(int compId)
2989{
2990 if (_requestMessageInfoMap.contains(compId) && !_requestMessageInfoMap[compId].isEmpty()) {
2991 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
2992 << "active request still in progress for compId"
2993 << compId
2994 << "activeCount"
2995 << _requestMessageInfoMap[compId].count();
2996 return;
2997 }
2998
2999 if (!_requestMessageQueueMap.contains(compId) || _requestMessageQueueMap[compId].isEmpty()) {
3000 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "no queued request for compId" << compId;
3001 _requestMessageQueueMap.remove(compId);
3002 return;
3003 }
3004
3005 RequestMessageInfo_t* requestMessageInfo = _requestMessageQueueMap[compId].takeFirst();
3006 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3007 const QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3008 const int remainingQueue = _requestMessageQueueMap[compId].count();
3009 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
3010 << "dequeued next request compId:msgId"
3011 << compId
3012 << msgName
3013 << "remainingQueue"
3014 << remainingQueue;
3015
3016 if (_requestMessageQueueMap[compId].isEmpty()) {
3017 _requestMessageQueueMap.remove(compId);
3018 }
3019
3020 _requestMessageSendNow(requestMessageInfo);
3021}
3022
3023
3024void Vehicle::_waitForMavlinkMessageMessageReceivedHandler(const mavlink_message_t& message)
3025{
3026 if (_requestMessageInfoMap.contains(message.compid) && _requestMessageInfoMap[message.compid].contains(message.msgid)) {
3027 auto pInfo = _requestMessageInfoMap[message.compid][message.msgid];
3028 auto resultHandler = pInfo->resultHandler;
3029 auto resultHandlerData = pInfo->resultHandlerData;
3030
3031 const mavlink_message_info_t *info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(message.msgid);
3032 QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(message.msgid);
3033 const int activeCount = _requestMessageInfoMap.contains(message.compid) ? _requestMessageInfoMap[message.compid].count() : 0;
3034 const int queueDepth = _requestMessageQueueMap.contains(message.compid) ? _requestMessageQueueMap[message.compid].count() : 0;
3035 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
3036 << "message received - compId:msgId"
3037 << message.compid
3038 << msgName
3039 << "activeCount"
3040 << activeCount
3041 << "queueDepth"
3042 << queueDepth;
3043
3044 if (!pInfo->commandAckReceived) {
3045 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "message received before ack came back.";
3046 int entryIndex = _findMavCommandListEntryIndex(message.compid, MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE);
3047 if (entryIndex != -1) {
3048 _mavCommandList.takeAt(entryIndex);
3049 } else {
3050 qWarning() << "Removing request message command from list failed - not found in list";
3051 }
3052 }
3053 _removeRequestMessageInfo(message.compid, message.msgid);
3054
3055 (*resultHandler)(resultHandlerData, MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED, RequestMessageNoFailure, message);
3056 } else {
3057 // We use any incoming message as a trigger to check timeouts on message requests
3058
3059 for (auto& compIdEntry : _requestMessageInfoMap) {
3060 for (auto requestMessageInfo : compIdEntry) {
3061 // Unit-test environments can have enough scheduling jitter that a 50ms
3062 // response deadline causes false request-message timeouts.
3063 const int messageWaitTimeoutMs = qgcApp()->runningUnitTests() ? 500 : 1000;
3064 if (requestMessageInfo->messageWaitElapsedTimer.isValid() && requestMessageInfo->messageWaitElapsedTimer.elapsed() > messageWaitTimeoutMs) {
3065 auto resultHandler = requestMessageInfo->resultHandler;
3066 auto resultHandlerData = requestMessageInfo->resultHandlerData;
3067
3068 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3069 QString msgName = info ? info->name : QString::number(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3070 const int queueDepth = _requestMessageQueueMap.contains(requestMessageInfo->compId) ? _requestMessageQueueMap[requestMessageInfo->compId].count() : 0;
3071 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
3072 << "request message timed out - compId:msgId"
3073 << requestMessageInfo->compId
3074 << msgName
3075 << "queueDepth"
3076 << queueDepth;
3077
3078 _removeRequestMessageInfo(requestMessageInfo->compId, requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3079
3080 mavlink_message_t timeoutMessage;
3081 (*resultHandler)(resultHandlerData, MAV_RESULT_FAILED, RequestMessageFailureMessageNotReceived, timeoutMessage);
3082
3083 return; // We only handle one timeout at a time
3084 }
3085 }
3086 }
3087 }
3088}
3089
3090void Vehicle::_requestMessageCmdResultHandler(void* resultHandlerData_, [[maybe_unused]] int compId, const mavlink_command_ack_t& ack, MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode)
3091{
3092 auto requestMessageInfo = static_cast<RequestMessageInfo_t*>(resultHandlerData_);
3093 auto resultHandler = requestMessageInfo->resultHandler;
3094 auto resultHandlerData = requestMessageInfo->resultHandlerData;
3095 Vehicle* vehicle = requestMessageInfo->vehicle; // QPointer converts to raw pointer, null if Vehicle destroyed
3096 auto message [[maybe_unused]] = requestMessageInfo->message;
3097
3098 // Vehicle was destroyed before callback fired - clean up and return without accessing vehicle
3099 if (!vehicle) {
3100 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Vehicle destroyed before callback - skipping";
3101 delete requestMessageInfo;
3102 return;
3103 }
3104
3105 requestMessageInfo->commandAckReceived = true;
3106 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3107 const QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3108 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
3109 << "ack for requestMessage compId:msgId"
3110 << requestMessageInfo->compId
3111 << msgName
3112 << "ack"
3113 << QGCMAVLink::mavResultToString(static_cast<MAV_RESULT>(ack.result))
3114 << "failureCode"
3115 << mavCmdResultFailureCodeToString(failureCode);
3116
3117 if (ack.result != MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) {
3118 mavlink_message_t ackMessage;
3119 RequestMessageResultHandlerFailureCode_t requestMessageFailureCode = RequestMessageNoFailure;
3120
3121 switch (failureCode) {
3122 case Vehicle::MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly:
3123 requestMessageFailureCode = RequestMessageFailureCommandError;
3124 break;
3125 case Vehicle::MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand:
3126 requestMessageFailureCode = RequestMessageFailureCommandNotAcked;
3127 break;
3128 case Vehicle::MavCmdResultFailureDuplicateCommand:
3129 requestMessageFailureCode = RequestMessageFailureDuplicate;
3130 break;
3131 }
3132
3133 vehicle->_removeRequestMessageInfo(requestMessageInfo->compId, requestMessageInfo->msgId);
3134
3135 (*resultHandler)(resultHandlerData, static_cast<MAV_RESULT>(ack.result), requestMessageFailureCode, ackMessage);
3136
3137 return;
3138 }
3139
3140 if (requestMessageInfo->messageReceived) {
3141 // This should never happen. The command should have already been removed from the list when the message was received
3142 qWarning() << "Command result handler should now have been called if message has already been received";
3143 } else {
3144 // Now that the request has been acked we start the timer to wait for the message
3145 requestMessageInfo->messageWaitElapsedTimer.start();
3146 }
3147}
3148
3149void Vehicle::_requestMessageWaitForMessageResultHandler(void* resultHandlerData, bool noResponsefromVehicle, const mavlink_message_t& message)
3150{
3151 RequestMessageInfo_t* pInfo = static_cast<RequestMessageInfo_t*>(resultHandlerData);
3152
3153 pInfo->messageReceived = true;
3154 if (pInfo->commandAckReceived) {
3155 (*pInfo->resultHandler)(pInfo->resultHandlerData, noResponsefromVehicle ? MAV_RESULT_FAILED : MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED, noResponsefromVehicle ? RequestMessageFailureMessageNotReceived : RequestMessageNoFailure, message);
3156 } else {
3157 // Result handler will be called when we get the Ack
3158 pInfo->message = message;
3159 }
3160}
3161
3162void Vehicle::requestMessage(RequestMessageResultHandler resultHandler, void* resultHandlerData, int compId, int messageId, float param1, float param2, float param3, float param4, float param5)
3163{
3164 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(messageId);
3165 const QString msgName = info ? QString(info->name) : QString::number(messageId);
3166 const int activeCount = _requestMessageInfoMap.contains(compId) ? _requestMessageInfoMap[compId].count() : 0;
3167 const int queueDepth = _requestMessageQueueMap.contains(compId) ? _requestMessageQueueMap[compId].count() : 0;
3168 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
3169 << "incoming request compId:msgId"
3170 << compId
3171 << msgName
3172 << "activeCount"
3173 << activeCount
3174 << "queueDepth"
3175 << queueDepth;
3176
3177 auto requestMessageInfo = new RequestMessageInfo_t;
3178 requestMessageInfo->vehicle = this;
3179 requestMessageInfo->compId = compId;
3180 requestMessageInfo->msgId = messageId;
3181 requestMessageInfo->param1 = param1;
3182 requestMessageInfo->param2 = param2;
3183 requestMessageInfo->param3 = param3;
3184 requestMessageInfo->param4 = param4;
3185 requestMessageInfo->param5 = param5;
3186 requestMessageInfo->resultHandler = resultHandler;
3187 requestMessageInfo->resultHandlerData = resultHandlerData;
3188
3189 if (_requestMessageDuplicate(compId, messageId)) {
3190 mavlink_message_t ackMessage = {};
3191 qCWarning(VehicleLog) << "failing exact duplicate compId:msgId" << compId << msgName;
3192 (*resultHandler)(resultHandlerData,
3193 MAV_RESULT_FAILED,
3194 RequestMessageFailureDuplicate,
3195 ackMessage);
3196 delete requestMessageInfo;
3197 return;
3198 }
3199
3200 if (_requestMessageInfoMap.contains(compId) && !_requestMessageInfoMap[compId].isEmpty()) {
3201 _requestMessageQueueMap[compId].append(requestMessageInfo);
3202 qCDebug(VehicleLog)
3203 << "queued request compId:msgId"
3204 << compId
3205 << msgName
3206 << "newQueueDepth"
3207 << _requestMessageQueueMap[compId].count();
3208 return;
3209 }
3210
3211 _requestMessageSendNow(requestMessageInfo);
3212}
3213
3214void Vehicle::setPrearmError(const QString& prearmError)
3215{
3216 _prearmError = prearmError;
3217 emit prearmErrorChanged(_prearmError);
3218 if (!_prearmError.isEmpty()) {
3219 _prearmErrorTimer.start();
3220 }
3221}
3222
3223void Vehicle::_prearmErrorTimeout()
3224{
3225 setPrearmError(QString());
3226}
3227
3228void Vehicle::setFirmwareVersion(int majorVersion, int minorVersion, int patchVersion, FIRMWARE_VERSION_TYPE versionType)
3229{
3230 _firmwareMajorVersion = majorVersion;
3231 _firmwareMinorVersion = minorVersion;
3232 _firmwarePatchVersion = patchVersion;
3233 _firmwareVersionType = versionType;
3234 emit firmwareVersionChanged();
3235}
3236
3237void Vehicle::setFirmwareCustomVersion(int majorVersion, int minorVersion, int patchVersion)
3238{
3239 _firmwareCustomMajorVersion = majorVersion;
3240 _firmwareCustomMinorVersion = minorVersion;
3241 _firmwareCustomPatchVersion = patchVersion;
3242 emit firmwareCustomVersionChanged();
3243}

3245QString Vehicle::firmwareVersionTypeString() const
3246{

3249
3250void Vehicle::_rebootCommandResultHandler(void* resultHandlerData, int /*compId*/, const mavlink_command_ack_t& ack, MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode)
3251{
3252 Vehicle* vehicle = static_cast<Vehicle*>(resultHandlerData);
3253
3254 if (ack.result != MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) {
3255 switch (failureCode) {
3256 case MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly:
3257 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << QStringLiteral("MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_REBOOT_SHUTDOWN error(%1)").arg(ack.result);
3258 break;
3259 case MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand:
3260 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_REBOOT_SHUTDOWN failed: no response from vehicle";
3261 break;
3262 case MavCmdResultFailureDuplicateCommand:
3263 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_REBOOT_SHUTDOWN failed: duplicate command";
3264 break;
3265 }
3266 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Vehicle reboot failed."));
3267 } else {
3268 vehicle->closeVehicle();
3269 }
3270}
3271
3272void Vehicle::rebootVehicle()
3273{
3274 Vehicle::MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t handlerInfo = {};
3275 handlerInfo.resultHandler = _rebootCommandResultHandler;
3276 handlerInfo.resultHandlerData = this;
3277
3278 sendMavCommandWithHandler(&handlerInfo, _defaultComponentId, MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_REBOOT_SHUTDOWN, 1);
3279}
3280
3281void Vehicle::startCalibration(QGCMAVLink::CalibrationType calType)
3282{
3283 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
3284 if (!sharedLink) {
3285 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "startCalibration: primary link gone!";
3286 return;
3287 }
3288
3289 float param1 = 0;
3290 float param2 = 0;
3291 float param3 = 0;
3292 float param4 = 0;
3293 float param5 = 0;
3294 float param6 = 0;
3295 float param7 = 0;
3296
3297 switch (calType) {
3298 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationGyro:
3299 param1 = 1;
3300 break;
3301 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationMag:
3302 param2 = 1;
3303 break;
3304 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationRadio:
3305 param4 = 1;
3306 break;
3307 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationCopyTrims:
3308 param4 = 2;
3309 break;
3310 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationAccel:
3311 param5 = 1;
3312 break;
3313 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationLevel:
3314 param5 = 2;
3315 break;
3316 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationEsc:
3317 param7 = 1;
3318 break;
3319 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationPX4Airspeed:
3320 param6 = 1;
3321 break;
3322 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationPX4Pressure:
3323 param3 = 1;
3324 break;
3325 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationAPMCompassMot:
3326 param6 = 1;
3327 break;
3328 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationAPMPressureAirspeed:
3329 param3 = 1;
3330 break;
3331 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationAPMPreFlight:
3332 param3 = 1; // GroundPressure/Airspeed
3333 if (multiRotor() || rover()) {
3334 // Gyro cal for ArduCopter only
3335 param1 = 1;
3336 }
3337 break;
3338 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationAPMAccelSimple:
3339 param5 = 4;
3340 break;
3341 case QGCMAVLink::CalibrationNone:
3342 default:
3343 break;
3344 }
3345
3346 // We can't use sendMavCommand here since we have no idea how long it will be before the command returns a result. This in turn
3347 // causes the retry logic to break down.
3348 mavlink_message_t msg;
3349 mavlink_msg_command_long_pack_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
3350 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
3351 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
3352 &msg,
3353 id(),
3354 defaultComponentId(), // target component
3355 MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_CALIBRATION, // command id
3356 0, // 0=first transmission of command
3357 param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7);
3358 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
3359}
3360
3361void Vehicle::stopCalibration(bool showError)
3362{
3363 sendMavCommand(defaultComponentId(), // target component
3364 MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_CALIBRATION, // command id
3365 showError,
3366 0, // gyro cal
3367 0, // mag cal
3368 0, // ground pressure
3369 0, // radio cal
3370 0, // accel cal
3371 0, // airspeed cal
3372 0); // unused
3373}
3374
3375void Vehicle::startUAVCANBusConfig(void)
3376{
3377 sendMavCommand(defaultComponentId(), // target component
3378 MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_UAVCAN, // command id
3379 true, // showError
3380 1); // start config
3381}
3382
3383void Vehicle::stopUAVCANBusConfig(void)
3384{
3385 sendMavCommand(defaultComponentId(), // target component
3386 MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_UAVCAN, // command id
3387 true, // showError
3388 0); // stop config
3389}
3390
3391void Vehicle::setSoloFirmware(bool soloFirmware)
3392{
3393 if (soloFirmware != _soloFirmware) {
3394 _soloFirmware = soloFirmware;
3395 emit soloFirmwareChanged(soloFirmware);
3396 }
3397}

3399void Vehicle::motorTest(int motor, int percent, int timeoutSecs, bool showError)
3400{
3401 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId, MAV_CMD_DO_MOTOR_TEST, showError, motor, MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_PERCENT, percent, timeoutSecs, 0, MOTOR_TEST_ORDER_BOARD);
3402}

3414void Vehicle::setOfflineEditingDefaultComponentId(int defaultComponentId)
3415{
3416 if (_offlineEditingVehicle) {
3417 _defaultComponentId = defaultComponentId;
3418 } else {
3419 qCWarning(VehicleLog) << "Call to Vehicle::setOfflineEditingDefaultComponentId on vehicle which is not offline";
3420 }
3421}
3422
3423void Vehicle::setVtolInFwdFlight(bool vtolInFwdFlight)
3424{
3425 if (_vtolInFwdFlight != vtolInFwdFlight) {
3426 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId,
3427 MAV_CMD_DO_VTOL_TRANSITION,
3428 true, // show errors
3429 vtolInFwdFlight ? MAV_VTOL_STATE_FW : MAV_VTOL_STATE_MC, // transition state
3430 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0); // param 2-7 unused
3431 }
3432}
3433
3434void Vehicle::startMavlinkLog()
3435{
3436 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId, MAV_CMD_LOGGING_START, false /* showError */);
3437}
3438
3439void Vehicle::stopMavlinkLog()
3440{
3441 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId, MAV_CMD_LOGGING_STOP, false /* showError */);
3442}
3443
3444void Vehicle::_ackMavlinkLogData(uint16_t sequence)
3445{
3446 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
3447 if (!sharedLink) {
3448 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_ackMavlinkLogData: primary link gone!";
3449 return;
3450 }
3451
3452 mavlink_message_t msg;
3453 mavlink_logging_ack_t ack;
3454
3455 memset(&ack, 0, sizeof(ack));
3456 ack.sequence = sequence;
3457 ack.target_component = _defaultComponentId;
3458 ack.target_system = id();
3459 mavlink_msg_logging_ack_encode_chan(
3460 MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
3461 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
3462 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
3463 &msg,
3464 &ack);
3465 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
3466}
3467
3468void Vehicle::_handleMavlinkLoggingData(mavlink_message_t& message)
3469{
3470 mavlink_logging_data_t log;
3471 mavlink_msg_logging_data_decode(&message, &log);
3472 if (static_cast<size_t>(log.length) > sizeof(log.data)) {
3473 qWarning() << "Invalid length for LOGGING_DATA, discarding." << log.length;
3474 } else {
3475 emit mavlinkLogData(this, log.target_system, log.target_component, log.sequence,
3476 log.first_message_offset, QByteArray((const char*)log.data, log.length), false);
3477 }
3478}
3479
3480void Vehicle::_handleMavlinkLoggingDataAcked(mavlink_message_t& message)
3481{
3482 mavlink_logging_data_acked_t log;
3483 mavlink_msg_logging_data_acked_decode(&message, &log);
3484 _ackMavlinkLogData(log.sequence);
3485 if (static_cast<size_t>(log.length) > sizeof(log.data)) {
3486 qWarning() << "Invalid length for LOGGING_DATA_ACKED, discarding." << log.length;
3487 } else {
3488 emit mavlinkLogData(this, log.target_system, log.target_component, log.sequence,
3489 log.first_message_offset, QByteArray((const char*)log.data, log.length), false);
3490 }
3491}
3492

3494{

3496 _firmwarePluginInstanceData = firmwarePluginInstanceData;
3497}

3565const QVariantList& Vehicle::toolIndicators()

3573
3574void Vehicle::_setupAutoDisarmSignalling()
3575{
3576 QString param = _firmwarePlugin->autoDisarmParameter(this);
3577
3578 if (!param.isEmpty() && _parameterManager->parameterExists(ParameterManager::defaultComponentId, param)) {
3579 Fact* fact = _parameterManager->getParameter(ParameterManager::defaultComponentId,param);
3580 connect(fact, &Fact::rawValueChanged, this, &Vehicle::autoDisarmChanged);
3581 emit autoDisarmChanged();
3582 }
3583}
3584
3585bool Vehicle::autoDisarm()
3586{
3587 QString param = _firmwarePlugin->autoDisarmParameter(this);
3588
3589 if (!param.isEmpty() && _parameterManager->parameterExists(ParameterManager::defaultComponentId, param)) {
3590 Fact* fact = _parameterManager->getParameter(ParameterManager::defaultComponentId,param);
3591 return fact->rawValue().toDouble() > 0;
3592 }
3593
3594 return false;
3595}
3596
3597void Vehicle::_updateDistanceHeadingHome()
3598{
3599 if (coordinate().isValid() && homePosition().isValid()) {
3600 _distanceToHomeFact.setRawValue(coordinate().distanceTo(homePosition()));
3601 if (_distanceToHomeFact.rawValue().toDouble() > 1.0) {
3602 _headingToHomeFact.setRawValue(coordinate().azimuthTo(homePosition()));
3603 _headingFromHomeFact.setRawValue(homePosition().azimuthTo(coordinate()));
3604 } else {
3605 _headingToHomeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3606 _headingFromHomeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3607 }
3608 } else {
3609 _distanceToHomeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3610 _headingToHomeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3611 _headingFromHomeFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3612 }
3613}
3614
3615void Vehicle::_updateHeadingToNextWP()
3616{
3617 const int currentIndex = _missionManager->currentIndex();
3618 QList<MissionItem*> llist = _missionManager->missionItems();
3619
3620 if(llist.size()>currentIndex && currentIndex!=-1
3621 && llist[currentIndex]->coordinate().longitude()!=0.0
3622 && coordinate().distanceTo(llist[currentIndex]->coordinate())>5.0 ){
3623
3624 _headingToNextWPFact.setRawValue(coordinate().azimuthTo(llist[currentIndex]->coordinate()));
3625 }
3626 else{
3627 _headingToNextWPFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3628 }
3629}
3630
3631void Vehicle::_updateMissionItemIndex()
3632{
3633 const int currentIndex = _missionManager->currentIndex();
3634
3635 unsigned offset = 0;
3636 if (!_firmwarePlugin->sendHomePositionToVehicle()) {
3637 offset = 1;
3638 }
3639
3640 _missionItemIndexFact.setRawValue(currentIndex + offset);
3641}
3642
3643void Vehicle::_updateDistanceHeadingGCS()
3644{
3645 QGeoCoordinate gcsPosition = QGCPositionManager::instance()->gcsPosition();
3646 if (coordinate().isValid() && gcsPosition.isValid()) {
3647 _distanceToGCSFact.setRawValue(coordinate().distanceTo(gcsPosition));
3648 _headingFromGCSFact.setRawValue(gcsPosition.azimuthTo(coordinate()));
3649 } else {
3650 _distanceToGCSFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3651 _headingFromGCSFact.setRawValue(qQNaN());
3652 }
3653}
3654
3655void Vehicle::_updateHomepoint()
3656{
3657 const bool setHomeCmdSupported = firmwarePlugin()->supportedMissionCommands(vehicleClass()).contains(MAV_CMD_DO_SET_HOME);
3658 const bool updateHomeActivated = SettingsManager::instance()->flyViewSettings()->updateHomePosition()->rawValue().toBool();
3659 if(setHomeCmdSupported && updateHomeActivated){
3660 QGeoCoordinate gcsPosition = QGCPositionManager::instance()->gcsPosition();
3661 if (coordinate().isValid() && gcsPosition.isValid()) {
3662 sendMavCommand(defaultComponentId(),
3663 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_HOME, false,
3664 0,
3665 0, 0, 0,
3666 static_cast<float>(gcsPosition.latitude()) ,
3667 static_cast<float>(gcsPosition.longitude()),
3668 static_cast<float>(gcsPosition.altitude()));
3669 }
3670 }
3671}
3672
3673void Vehicle::_updateHobbsMeter()
3674{
3675 _hobbsFact.setRawValue(hobbsMeter());
3676}
3677
3678void Vehicle::forceInitialPlanRequestComplete()
3679{
3680 _initialPlanRequestComplete = true;
3681 emit initialPlanRequestCompleteChanged(true);
3682}

3684void Vehicle::sendPlan(QString planFile)
3685{
3686 PlanMasterController::sendPlanToVehicle(this, planFile);
3687}

3689QString Vehicle::hobbsMeter()
3690{

3692}
