3694void Vehicle::_vehicleParamLoaded(bool ready)
3695{
3696 //-- TODO: This seems silly but can you think of a better
3697 // way to update this?
3698 if(ready) {
3699 emit hobbsMeterChanged();
3700 }
3701}
3702
3703void Vehicle::_mavlinkMessageStatus(int uasId, uint64_t totalSent, uint64_t totalReceived, uint64_t totalLoss, float lossPercent)
3704{
3705 if(uasId == _systemID) {
3706 _mavlinkSentCount = totalSent;
3707 _mavlinkReceivedCount = totalReceived;
3708 _mavlinkLossCount = totalLoss;
3709 _mavlinkLossPercent = lossPercent;
3710 emit mavlinkStatusChanged();
3711 }
3712}
3713
3714int Vehicle::versionCompare(const QString& compare) const
3715{
3716 return _firmwarePlugin->versionCompare(this, compare);
3717}
3718
3719int Vehicle::versionCompare(int major, int minor, int patch) const
3720{
3721 return _firmwarePlugin->versionCompare(this, major, minor, patch);
3722}
3723
3724void Vehicle::setPIDTuningTelemetryMode(PIDTuningTelemetryMode mode)
3725{
3726 bool liveUpdate = mode != ModeDisabled;
3727 setLiveUpdates(liveUpdate);
3728 _setpointFactGroup.setLiveUpdates(liveUpdate);
3729 _localPositionFactGroup.setLiveUpdates(liveUpdate);
3730 _localPositionSetpointFactGroup.setLiveUpdates(liveUpdate);
3731
3732 switch (mode) {
3733 case ModeDisabled:
3734 _mavlinkStreamConfig.restoreDefaults();
3735 break;
3736 case ModeRateAndAttitude:
3737 _mavlinkStreamConfig.setHighRateRateAndAttitude();
3738 break;
3739 case ModeVelocityAndPosition:
3740 _mavlinkStreamConfig.setHighRateVelAndPos();
3741 break;
3742 case ModeAltitudeAndAirspeed:
3743 _mavlinkStreamConfig.setHighRateAltAirspeed();
3744 // reset the altitude offset to the current value, so the plotted value is around 0
3745 if (!qIsNaN(_altitudeTuningOffset)) {
3746 _altitudeTuningOffset += _altitudeTuningFact.rawValue().toDouble();
3747 _altitudeTuningSetpointFact.setRawValue(0.f);
3748 _altitudeTuningFact.setRawValue(0.f);
3749 }
3750 break;
3751 }
3752}
3753
3754void Vehicle::_setMessageInterval(int messageId, int rate)
3755{
3756 sendMavCommand(defaultComponentId(),
3757 MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL,
3758 true, // show error
3759 messageId,
3760 rate);
3761}
3762
3763QString Vehicle::_formatMavCommand(MAV_CMD command, float param1)
3764{
3765 QString commandName = MissionCommandTree::instance()->rawName(command);
3766
3767 if (command == MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE && param1 > 0) {
3768 const mavlink_message_info_t* info = mavlink_get_message_info_by_id(static_cast<uint32_t>(param1));
3769 QString param1Str = info ? QString("%1(%2)").arg(param1).arg(info->name) : QString::number(param1);
3770 return QString("%1: %2").arg(commandName).arg(param1Str);
3771 }
3772 return QString("%1: %2").arg(commandName).arg(param1);
3773}
3774
3775bool Vehicle::isInitialConnectComplete() const
3776{
3777 return !_initialConnectStateMachine->active();
3778}
3779
3780void Vehicle::_initializeCsv()
3781{
3782 if (!SettingsManager::instance()->mavlinkSettings()->saveCsvTelemetry()->rawValue().toBool()) {
3783 return;
3784 }
3785 QString now = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString("yyyy-MM-dd hh-mm-ss");
3786 QString fileName = QString("%1 vehicle%2.csv").arg(now).arg(_systemID);
3787 QDir saveDir(SettingsManager::instance()->appSettings()->telemetrySavePath());
3788 _csvLogFile.setFileName(saveDir.absoluteFilePath(fileName));
3789
3790 if (!_csvLogFile.open(QIODevice::Append)) {
3791 qCWarning(VehicleLog) << "unable to open file for csv logging, Stopping csv logging!";
3792 return;
3793 }
3794
3795 QTextStream stream(&_csvLogFile);
3796 QStringList allFactNames;
3797 allFactNames << factNames();
3798 for (const QString& groupName: factGroupNames()) {
3799 for(const QString& factName: getFactGroup(groupName)->factNames()){
3800 allFactNames << QString("%1.%2").arg(groupName, factName);
3801 }
3802 }
3803 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Facts logged to csv:" << allFactNames;
3804 stream << "Timestamp," << allFactNames.join(",") << "\n";
3805}
3806
3807void Vehicle::_writeCsvLine()
3808{
3809 // Only save the logs after the the vehicle gets armed, unless "Save logs even if vehicle was not armed" is checked
3810 if(!_csvLogFile.isOpen() &&
3811 (_armed || SettingsManager::instance()->mavlinkSettings()->telemetrySaveNotArmed()->rawValue().toBool())){
3812 _initializeCsv();
3813 }
3814
3815 if(!_csvLogFile.isOpen()){
3816 return;
3817 }
3818
3819 QStringList allFactValues;
3820 QTextStream stream(&_csvLogFile);
3821
3822 // Write timestamp to csv file
3823 allFactValues << QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString(QStringLiteral("yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.zzz"));
3824 // Write Vehicle's own facts
3825 for (const QString& factName : factNames()) {
3826 allFactValues << getFact(factName)->cookedValueString();
3827 }
3828 // write facts from Vehicle's FactGroups
3829 for (const QString& groupName: factGroupNames()) {
3830 for (const QString& factName : getFactGroup(groupName)->factNames()) {
3831 allFactValues << getFactGroup(groupName)->getFact(factName)->cookedValueString();
3832 }
3833 }
3834
3835 stream << allFactValues.join(",") << "\n";
3836}
3837
3838void Vehicle::doSetHome(const QGeoCoordinate& coord)
3839{
3840 if (coord.isValid()) {
3841 // If for some reason we already did a query and it hasn't arrived yet, disconnect signals and unset current query. TerrainQuery system will
3842 // automatically delete that forgotten query. This could happen if we send 2 do_set_home commands one after another, so usually the latest one
3843 // is the one we would want to arrive to the vehicle, so it is fine to forget about the previous ones in case it could happen.
3844 if (_currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery) {
3845 disconnect(_currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery, &TerrainAtCoordinateQuery::terrainDataReceived, this, &Vehicle::_doSetHomeTerrainReceived);
3846 _currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = nullptr;
3847 }
3848 // Save the coord for using when our terrain data arrives. If there was a pending terrain query paired with an older coordinate it is safe to
3849 // Override now, as we just disconnected the signal that would trigger the command sending
3850 _doSetHomeCoordinate = coord;
3851 // Now setup and trigger the new terrain query
3852 _currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = new TerrainAtCoordinateQuery(true /* autoDelet */);
3853 connect(_currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery, &TerrainAtCoordinateQuery::terrainDataReceived, this, &Vehicle::_doSetHomeTerrainReceived);
3854 QList<QGeoCoordinate> rgCoord;
3855 rgCoord.append(coord);
3856 _currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery->requestData(rgCoord);
3857 }
3858}
3859
3860// This will be called after our query started in doSetHome arrives
3861void Vehicle::_doSetHomeTerrainReceived(bool success, QList<double> heights)
3862{
3863 if (success) {
3864 double terrainAltitude = heights[0];
3865 // Coord and terrain alt sanity check
3866 if (_doSetHomeCoordinate.isValid() && terrainAltitude <= SET_HOME_TERRAIN_ALT_MAX && terrainAltitude >= SET_HOME_TERRAIN_ALT_MIN) {
3867 sendMavCommand(
3868 defaultComponentId(),
3869 MAV_CMD_DO_SET_HOME,
3870 true, // show error if fails
3871 0,
3872 0,
3873 0,
3874 static_cast<float>(qQNaN()),
3875 _doSetHomeCoordinate.latitude(),
3876 _doSetHomeCoordinate.longitude(),
3877 terrainAltitude);
3878
3879 } else if (_doSetHomeCoordinate.isValid()) {
3880 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_doSetHomeTerrainReceived: internal error, elevation data out of limits ";
3881 } else {
3882 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_doSetHomeTerrainReceived: internal error, cached home coordinate is not valid";
3883 }
3884 } else {
3885 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Set Home failed, terrain data not available for selected coordinate"));
3886 }
3887 // Clean up
3888 _currentDoSetHomeTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = nullptr;
3889 _doSetHomeCoordinate = QGeoCoordinate(); // So isValid() will no longer return true, for extra safety
3890}
3891
3892void Vehicle::_updateAltAboveTerrain()
3893{
3894 // We won't do another query if the previous query was done closer than 2 meters from current position
3895 // or if altitude change has been less than 0.5 meters since then.
3896 const qreal minimumDistanceTraveled = 2;
3897 const float minimumAltitudeChanged = 0.5f;
3898
3899 // This is not super elegant but it works to limit the amount of queries we do. It seems more than 500ms is not possible to get
3900 // serviced on time. It is not a big deal if it is not serviced on time as terrain queries can manage that just fine, but QGC would
3901 // use resources to service those queries, and it is pointless, so this is a quick workaround to not waste that little computing time
3902 int altitudeAboveTerrQueryMinInterval = 500;
3903 if (_altitudeAboveTerrQueryTimer.elapsed() < altitudeAboveTerrQueryMinInterval) {
3904 // qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_updateAltAboveTerrain: minimum 500ms interval between queries not reached, returning";
3905 return;
3906 }
3907 // Sanity check, although it is very unlikely that vehicle coordinate is not valid
3908 if (_coordinate.isValid()) {
3909 // Check for minimum distance and altitude traveled before doing query, to not do a lot of queries of the same data
3910 if (_altitudeAboveTerrLastCoord.isValid() && !qIsNaN(_altitudeAboveTerrLastRelAlt)) {
3911 if (_altitudeAboveTerrLastCoord.distanceTo(_coordinate) < minimumDistanceTraveled && fabs(_altitudeRelativeFact.rawValue().toFloat() - _altitudeAboveTerrLastRelAlt) < minimumAltitudeChanged ) {
3912 return;
3913 }
3914 }
3915 _altitudeAboveTerrLastCoord = _coordinate;
3916 _altitudeAboveTerrLastRelAlt = _altitudeRelativeFact.rawValue().toFloat();
3917
3918 // If for some reason we already did a query and it hasn't arrived yet, disconnect signals and unset current query. TerrainQuery system will
3919 // automatically delete that forgotten query.
3920 if (_altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery) {
3921 // qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_updateAltAboveTerrain: cleaning previous query, no longer needed";
3922 disconnect(_altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery, &TerrainAtCoordinateQuery::terrainDataReceived, this, &Vehicle::_altitudeAboveTerrainReceived);
3923 _altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = nullptr;
3924 }
3925 // Now setup and trigger the new terrain query
3926 _altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = new TerrainAtCoordinateQuery(true /* autoDelet */);
3927 connect(_altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery, &TerrainAtCoordinateQuery::terrainDataReceived, this, &Vehicle::_altitudeAboveTerrainReceived);
3928 QList<QGeoCoordinate> rgCoord;
3929 rgCoord.append(_coordinate);
3930 _altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery->requestData(rgCoord);
3931 _altitudeAboveTerrQueryTimer.restart();
3932 }
3933}
3934
3935void Vehicle::_altitudeAboveTerrainReceived(bool success, QList<double> heights)
3936{
3937 if (!success) {
3938 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_altitudeAboveTerrainReceived: terrain data not available for vehicle coordinate";
3939 } else {
3940 // Query was succesful, save the data.
3941 double terrainAltitude = heights[0];
3942 double altitudeAboveTerrain = altitudeAMSL()->rawValue().toDouble() - terrainAltitude;
3943 _altitudeAboveTerrFact.setRawValue(altitudeAboveTerrain);
3944 }
3945 // Clean up
3946 _altitudeAboveTerrTerrainAtCoordinateQuery = nullptr;
3947}
3948
3949void Vehicle::_handleObstacleDistance(const mavlink_message_t& message)
3950{
3951 mavlink_obstacle_distance_t o;
3952 mavlink_msg_obstacle_distance_decode(&message, &o);
3953 _objectAvoidance->update(&o);
3954}
3955
3956void Vehicle::_handleFenceStatus(const mavlink_message_t& message)
3957{
3958 mavlink_fence_status_t fenceStatus;
3959
3960 mavlink_msg_fence_status_decode(&message, &fenceStatus);
3961
3962 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "_handleFenceStatus breach_status" << fenceStatus.breach_status;
3963
3964 static qint64 lastUpdate = 0;
3965 qint64 now = QDateTime::currentMSecsSinceEpoch();
3966 if (fenceStatus.breach_status == 1) {
3967 if (now - lastUpdate > 3000) {
3968 lastUpdate = now;
3969 QString breachTypeStr;
3970 switch (fenceStatus.breach_type) {
3971 case FENCE_BREACH_NONE:
3972 return;
3973 case FENCE_BREACH_MINALT:
3974 breachTypeStr = tr("minimum altitude");
3975 break;
3976 case FENCE_BREACH_MAXALT:
3977 breachTypeStr = tr("maximum altitude");
3978 break;
3979 case FENCE_BREACH_BOUNDARY:
3980 breachTypeStr = tr("boundary");
3981 break;
3982 default:
3983 break;
3984 }
3985
3986 _say(breachTypeStr + " " + tr("fence breached"));
3987 }
3988 } else {
3989 lastUpdate = now;
3990 }
3991}
3992
3993void Vehicle::updateFlightDistance(double distance)
3994{
3995 _flightDistanceFact.setRawValue(_flightDistanceFact.rawValue().toDouble() + distance);
3996}
3997
3998void Vehicle::sendParamMapRC(const QString& paramName, double scale, double centerValue, int tuningID, double minValue, double maxValue)
3999{
4000 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
4001 if (!sharedLink) {
4002 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "sendParamMapRC: primary link gone!";
4003 return;
4004 }
4005
4006 mavlink_message_t message;
4007
4008 char param_id_cstr[MAVLINK_MSG_PARAM_MAP_RC_FIELD_PARAM_ID_LEN] = {};
4009 // Copy string into buffer, ensuring not to exceed the buffer size
4010 for (unsigned int i = 0; i < sizeof(param_id_cstr); i++) {
4011 if ((int)i < paramName.length()) {
4012 param_id_cstr[i] = paramName.toLatin1()[i];
4013 }
4014 }
4015
4016 mavlink_msg_param_map_rc_pack_chan(static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId()),
4017 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId()),
4018 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
4019 &message,
4020 _systemID,
4021 MAV_COMP_ID_AUTOPILOT1,
4022 param_id_cstr,
4023 -1, // parameter name specified as string in previous argument
4024 static_cast<uint8_t>(tuningID),
4025 static_cast<float>(centerValue),
4026 static_cast<float>(scale),
4027 static_cast<float>(minValue),
4028 static_cast<float>(maxValue));
4029 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), message);
4030}
4031
4032void Vehicle::clearAllParamMapRC(void)
4033{
4034 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
4035 if (!sharedLink) {
4036 qCDebug(VehicleLog)<< "clearAllParamMapRC: primary link gone!";
4037 return;
4038 }
4039
4040 char param_id_cstr[MAVLINK_MSG_PARAM_MAP_RC_FIELD_PARAM_ID_LEN] = {};
4041
4042 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
4043 mavlink_message_t message;
4044 mavlink_msg_param_map_rc_pack_chan(static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId()),
4045 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId()),
4046 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
4047 &message,
4048 _systemID,
4049 MAV_COMP_ID_AUTOPILOT1,
4050 param_id_cstr,
4051 -2, // Disable map for specified tuning id
4052 i, // tuning id
4053 0, 0, 0, 0); // unused
4054 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), message);
4055 }
4056}
4057
4058void Vehicle::sendJoystickDataThreadSafe(float roll, float pitch, float yaw, float thrust, quint16 buttons, quint16 buttons2, float pitchExtension, float rollExtension, float aux1, float aux2, float aux3, float aux4, float aux5, float aux6)
4059{
4060 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
4061 if (!sharedLink) {
4062 qCDebug(VehicleLog)<< "sendJoystickDataThreadSafe: primary link gone!";
4063 return;
4064 }
4065
4066 if (sharedLink->linkConfiguration()->isHighLatency()) {
4067 return;
4068 }
4069
4070 mavlink_message_t message;
4071
4072 float axesScaling = 1.0 * 1000.0;
4073 uint8_t extensions = 0;
4074
4075 // Incoming values are in the range -1:1
4076 float newRollCommand = roll * axesScaling;
4077 float newPitchCommand = pitch * axesScaling;
4078 float newYawCommand = yaw * axesScaling;
4079 float newThrustCommand = thrust * axesScaling;
4080
4081 // Scale and set extension bits/values
4082 float incomingExtensionValues[] = { pitchExtension, rollExtension, aux1, aux2, aux3, aux4, aux5, aux6 };
4083 int16_t outgoingExtensionValues[std::size(incomingExtensionValues)];
4084 for (size_t i = 0; i < std::size(incomingExtensionValues); i++) {
4085 int16_t scaledValue = 0;
4086 if (!qIsNaN(incomingExtensionValues[i])) {
4087 scaledValue = static_cast<int16_t>(incomingExtensionValues[i] * axesScaling);
4088 extensions |= (1 << i);
4089 }
4090 outgoingExtensionValues[i] = scaledValue;
4091 }
4092 mavlink_msg_manual_control_pack_chan(
4093 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId()),
4094 static_cast<uint8_t>(MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId()),
4095 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
4096 &message,
4097 static_cast<uint8_t>(_systemID),
4098 static_cast<int16_t>(newPitchCommand),
4099 static_cast<int16_t>(newRollCommand),
4100 static_cast<int16_t>(newThrustCommand),
4101 static_cast<int16_t>(newYawCommand),
4102 buttons, buttons2,
4103 extensions,
4104 outgoingExtensionValues[0],
4105 outgoingExtensionValues[1],
4106 outgoingExtensionValues[2],
4107 outgoingExtensionValues[3],
4108 outgoingExtensionValues[4],
4109 outgoingExtensionValues[5],
4110 outgoingExtensionValues[6],
4111 outgoingExtensionValues[7]
4112 );
4113 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), message);
4114}
4115
4116void Vehicle::triggerSimpleCamera()
4117{
4118 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId,
4119 MAV_CMD_DO_DIGICAM_CONTROL,
4120 true, // show errors
4121 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, // param 1-4 unused
4122 1.0); // trigger camera
4123}
4124
4125void Vehicle::sendGripperAction(QGCMAVLink::GripperActions gripperAction)
4126{
4127 sendMavCommand(
4128 _defaultComponentId,
4129 MAV_CMD_DO_GRIPPER,
4130 true, // Show errors
4131 0, // Param1: Gripper ID (Always set to 0)
4132 gripperAction); // Param2: Gripper Action
4133}
4134
4135void Vehicle::setEstimatorOrigin(const QGeoCoordinate& centerCoord)
4136{
4137 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
4138 if (!sharedLink) {
4139 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "setEstimatorOrigin: primary link gone!";
4140 return;
4141 }
4142
4143 mavlink_message_t msg;
4144 mavlink_msg_set_gps_global_origin_pack_chan(
4145 MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(),
4146 MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(),
4147 sharedLink->mavlinkChannel(),
4148 &msg,
4149 id(),
4150 centerCoord.latitude() * 1e7,
4151 centerCoord.longitude() * 1e7,
4152 centerCoord.altitude() * 1e3,
4153 static_cast<float>(qQNaN())
4154 );
4155 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
4156}
4157
4158void Vehicle::pairRX(int rxType, int rxSubType)
4159{
4160 sendMavCommand(_defaultComponentId,
4161 MAV_CMD_START_RX_PAIR,
4162 true,
4163 rxType,
4164 rxSubType);
4165}
4166
4167void Vehicle::_handleMessageInterval(const mavlink_message_t& message)
4168{
4169 mavlink_message_interval_t data;
4170 mavlink_msg_message_interval_decode(&message, &data);
4171
4172 const MavCompMsgId compMsgId = {message.compid, data.message_id};
4173 const int32_t rate = ( data.interval_us > 0 ) ? 1000000.0 / data.interval_us : data.interval_us;
4174
4175 if(!_mavlinkMsgIntervals.contains(compMsgId) || _mavlinkMsgIntervals.value(compMsgId) != rate)
4176 {
4177 (void) _mavlinkMsgIntervals.insert(compMsgId, rate);
4178 emit mavlinkMsgIntervalsChanged(message.compid, data.message_id, rate);
4179 }
4180}
4181
4182void Vehicle::startTimerRevertAllowTakeover()
4183{
4184 _timerRevertAllowTakeover.stop();
4185 _timerRevertAllowTakeover.setSingleShot(true);
4186 _timerRevertAllowTakeover.setInterval(operatorControlTakeoverTimeoutMsecs());
4187 // Disconnect any previous connections to avoid multiple handlers
4188 disconnect(&_timerRevertAllowTakeover, &QTimer::timeout, nullptr, nullptr);
4189
4190 connect(&_timerRevertAllowTakeover, &QTimer::timeout, this, [this](){
4191 if (MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId() == _sysid_in_control) {
4192 this->requestOperatorControl(false);
4193 }
4194 });
4195 _timerRevertAllowTakeover.start();
4196}
4197
4198void Vehicle::requestOperatorControl(bool allowOverride, int requestTimeoutSecs)
4199{
4200 int safeRequestTimeoutSecs;
4201 int requestTimeoutSecsMin = SettingsManager::instance()->flyViewSettings()->requestControlTimeout()->cookedMin().toInt();
4202 int requestTimeoutSecsMax = SettingsManager::instance()->flyViewSettings()->requestControlTimeout()->cookedMax().toInt();
4203 if (requestTimeoutSecs >= requestTimeoutSecsMin && requestTimeoutSecs <= requestTimeoutSecsMax) {
4204 safeRequestTimeoutSecs = requestTimeoutSecs;
4205 } else {
4206 // If out of limits use default value
4207 safeRequestTimeoutSecs = SettingsManager::instance()->flyViewSettings()->requestControlTimeout()->cookedDefaultValue().toInt();
4208 }
4209
4210 const MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t handlerInfo = {&Vehicle::_requestOperatorControlAckHandler, this, nullptr, nullptr};
4211 sendMavCommandWithHandler(
4212 &handlerInfo,
4213 _defaultComponentId,
4214 MAV_CMD_REQUEST_OPERATOR_CONTROL,
4215 0, // System ID of GCS requesting control, 0 if it is this GCS
4216 1, // Action - 0: Release control, 1: Request control.
4217 allowOverride ? 1 : 0, // Allow takeover - Enable automatic granting of ownership on request. 0: Ask current owner and reject request, 1: Allow automatic takeover.
4218 safeRequestTimeoutSecs // Timeout in seconds before a request to a GCS to allow takeover is assumed to be rejected. This is used to display the timeout graphically on requestor and GCS in control.
4219 );
4220
4221 // If this is a request we sent to other GCS, start timer so User can not keep sending requests until the current timeout expires
4222 if (requestTimeoutSecs > 0) {
4223 requestOperatorControlStartTimer(requestTimeoutSecs * 1000);
4224 }
4225}
4226
4227void Vehicle::_requestOperatorControlAckHandler(void* resultHandlerData, int compId, const mavlink_command_ack_t& ack, MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode)
4228{
4229 // For the moment, this will always come from an autopilot, compid 1
4230 Q_UNUSED(compId);
4231
4232 // If duplicated or no response, show popup to user. Otherwise only log it.
4233 switch (failureCode) {
4234 case MavCmdResultFailureDuplicateCommand:
4235 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("Waiting for previous operator control request"));
4236 return;
4237 case MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand:
4238 qgcApp()->showAppMessage(tr("No response to operator control request"));
4239 return;
4240 default:
4241 break;
4242 }
4243
4244 Vehicle* vehicle = static_cast<Vehicle*>(resultHandlerData);
4245 if (!vehicle) {
4246 return;
4247 }
4248
4249 if (ack.result == MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) {
4250 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Operator control request accepted";
4251 } else {
4252 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Operator control request rejected";
4253 }
4254}
4255
4256void Vehicle::requestOperatorControlStartTimer(int requestTimeoutMsecs)
4257{
4258 // First flag requests not allowed
4259 _sendControlRequestAllowed = false;
4260 emit sendControlRequestAllowedChanged(false);
4261 // Setup timer to re enable it again after timeout
4262 _timerRequestOperatorControl.stop();
4263 _timerRequestOperatorControl.setSingleShot(true);
4264 _timerRequestOperatorControl.setInterval(requestTimeoutMsecs);
4265 // Disconnect any previous connections to avoid multiple handlers
4266 disconnect(&_timerRequestOperatorControl, &QTimer::timeout, nullptr, nullptr);
4267 connect(&_timerRequestOperatorControl, &QTimer::timeout, this, [this](){
4268 _sendControlRequestAllowed = true;
4269 emit sendControlRequestAllowedChanged(true);
4270 });
4271 _timerRequestOperatorControl.start();
4272}
4273
4274void Vehicle::_handleControlStatus(const mavlink_message_t& message)
4275{
4276 mavlink_control_status_t controlStatus;
4277 mavlink_msg_control_status_decode(&message, &controlStatus);
4278
4279 bool updateControlStatusSignals = false;
4280 if (_gcsControlStatusFlags != controlStatus.flags) {
4281 _gcsControlStatusFlags = controlStatus.flags;
4282 _gcsControlStatusFlags_SystemManager = controlStatus.flags & GCS_CONTROL_STATUS_FLAGS_SYSTEM_MANAGER;
4283 _gcsControlStatusFlags_TakeoverAllowed = controlStatus.flags & GCS_CONTROL_STATUS_FLAGS_TAKEOVER_ALLOWED;
4284 updateControlStatusSignals = true;
4285 }
4286
4287 if (_sysid_in_control != controlStatus.sysid_in_control) {
4288 _sysid_in_control = controlStatus.sysid_in_control;
4289 updateControlStatusSignals = true;
4290 }
4291
4292 if (!_firstControlStatusReceived) {
4293 _firstControlStatusReceived = true;
4294 updateControlStatusSignals = true;
4295 }
4296
4297 if (updateControlStatusSignals) {
4298 emit gcsControlStatusChanged();
4299 }
4300
4301 // If we were waiting for a request to be accepted and now it was accepted, adjust flags accordingly so
4302 // UI unlocks the request/take control button
4303 if (!sendControlRequestAllowed() && _gcsControlStatusFlags_TakeoverAllowed) {
4304 disconnect(&_timerRequestOperatorControl, &QTimer::timeout, nullptr, nullptr);
4305 _sendControlRequestAllowed = true;
4306 emit sendControlRequestAllowedChanged(true);
4307 }
4308}
4309
4310void Vehicle::_handleCommandRequestOperatorControl(const mavlink_command_long_t commandLong)
4311{
4312 emit requestOperatorControlReceived(commandLong.param1, commandLong.param3, commandLong.param4);
4313}
4314
4315void Vehicle::_handleCommandLong(const mavlink_message_t& message)
4316{
4317 mavlink_command_long_t commandLong;
4318 mavlink_msg_command_long_decode(&message, &commandLong);
4319 // Ignore command if it is not targeted for us
4320 if (commandLong.target_system != MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId()) {
4321 return;
4322 }
4323 if (commandLong.command == MAV_CMD_REQUEST_OPERATOR_CONTROL) {
4324 _handleCommandRequestOperatorControl(commandLong);
4325 }
4326}
4327
4328int Vehicle::operatorControlTakeoverTimeoutMsecs() const
4329{
4330 return REQUEST_OPERATOR_CONTROL_ALLOW_TAKEOVER_TIMEOUT_MSECS;
4331}
4332
4333void Vehicle::_requestMessageMessageIntervalResultHandler(void* resultHandlerData, MAV_RESULT result, RequestMessageResultHandlerFailureCode_t failureCode, const mavlink_message_t& message)
4334{
4335 if((result != MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) || (failureCode != RequestMessageNoFailure))
4336 {
4337 mavlink_message_interval_t data;
4338 mavlink_msg_message_interval_decode(&message, &data);
4339
4340 Vehicle* vehicle = static_cast<Vehicle*>(resultHandlerData);
4341 (void) vehicle->_unsupportedMessageIds.insert(message.compid, data.message_id);
4342 }
4343}
4344
4345void Vehicle::_requestMessageInterval(uint8_t compId, uint16_t msgId)
4346{
4347 if(!_unsupportedMessageIds.contains(compId, msgId))
4348 {
4349 requestMessage(
4350 &Vehicle::_requestMessageMessageIntervalResultHandler,
4351 this,
4352 compId,
4353 MAVLINK_MSG_ID_MESSAGE_INTERVAL,
4354 msgId
4355 );
4356 }
4357}
4358
4359int32_t Vehicle::getMessageRate(uint8_t compId, uint16_t msgId)
4360{
4361 // TODO: Use QGCMavlinkMessage
4362 const MavCompMsgId compMsgId = {compId, msgId};
4363 int32_t rate = 0;
4364 if(_mavlinkMsgIntervals.contains(compMsgId))
4365 {
4366 rate = _mavlinkMsgIntervals.value(compMsgId);
4367 }
4368 else
4369 {
4370 _requestMessageInterval(compId, msgId);
4371 }
4372 return rate;
4373}
4374
4375void Vehicle::_setMessageRateCommandResultHandler(void* resultHandlerData, int compId, const mavlink_command_ack_t& ack, MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode)
4376{
4377 if((ack.result == MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED) && (failureCode == MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly))
4378 {
4379 Vehicle* vehicle = static_cast<Vehicle*>(resultHandlerData);
4380 if(vehicle)
4381 {
4382 vehicle->_requestMessageInterval(compId, vehicle->_lastSetMsgIntervalMsgId);
4383 }
4384 }
4385}
4386
4387void Vehicle::setMessageRate(uint8_t compId, uint16_t msgId, int32_t rate)
4388{
4389 const MavCmdAckHandlerInfo_t handlerInfo = {
4390 /* .resultHandler = */ &Vehicle::_setMessageRateCommandResultHandler,
4391 /* .resultHandlerData = */ this,
4392 /* .progressHandler = */ nullptr,
4393 /* .progressHandlerData = */ nullptr
4394 };
4395
4396 const float interval = (rate > 0) ? 1000000.0 / rate : rate;
4397 _lastSetMsgIntervalMsgId = msgId;
4398
4399 sendMavCommandWithHandler(
4400 &handlerInfo,
4401 compId,
4402 MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL,
4403 msgId,
4404 interval
4405 );
4406}
4407
4408QVariant Vehicle::expandedToolbarIndicatorSource(const QString& indicatorName)
4409{
4410 return _firmwarePlugin->expandedToolbarIndicatorSource(this, indicatorName);
4411}
4412
4413QString Vehicle::requestMessageResultHandlerFailureCodeToString(RequestMessageResultHandlerFailureCode_t failureCode)
4414{
4415 switch(failureCode)
4416 {
4417 case RequestMessageNoFailure:
4418 return QStringLiteral("No Failure");
4419 case RequestMessageFailureCommandError:
4420 return QStringLiteral("Command Error");
4421 case RequestMessageFailureCommandNotAcked:
4422 return QStringLiteral("Command Not Acked");
4423 case RequestMessageFailureMessageNotReceived:
4424 return QStringLiteral("Message Not Received");
4425 case RequestMessageFailureDuplicate:
4426 return QStringLiteral("Duplicate Request");
4427 default:
4428 return QStringLiteral("Unknown (%1)").arg(failureCode);
4429 }
4430}
4431
4432QString Vehicle::mavCmdResultFailureCodeToString(MavCmdResultFailureCode_t failureCode)
4433{
4434 switch(failureCode)
4435 {
4436 case MavCmdResultCommandResultOnly:
4437 return QStringLiteral("Command Result Only");
4438 case MavCmdResultFailureNoResponseToCommand:
4439 return QStringLiteral("No Response To Command");
4440 case MavCmdResultFailureDuplicateCommand:
4441 return QStringLiteral("Duplicate Command");
4442 default:
4443 return QStringLiteral("Unknown (%1)").arg(failureCode);
4444 }
4445}
4446
4447/*===========================================================================*/
4448/* ardupilotmega Dialect */
4449/*===========================================================================*/
4450
4451void Vehicle::flashBootloader()
4452{
4453 if (apmFirmware()) {
4454 sendMavCommand(
4455 defaultComponentId(),
4456 MAV_CMD_FLASH_BOOTLOADER,
4457 true, // show error
4458 0, 0, 0, 0, // param 1-4 not used
4459 290876); // magic number
4460 }
4461}
4462
4463void Vehicle::motorInterlock(bool enable)
4464{
4465 if (apmFirmware()) {
4466 sendMavCommand(
4467 defaultComponentId(),
4468 MAV_CMD_DO_AUX_FUNCTION,
4469 true,
4470 APM::AUX_FUNC::MOTOR_INTERLOCK,
4471 enable ? MAV_CMD_DO_AUX_FUNCTION_SWITCH_LEVEL_HIGH : MAV_CMD_DO_AUX_FUNCTION_SWITCH_LEVEL_LOW);
4472 }
4473}
4474
4475/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4476/*===========================================================================*/
4477/* Status Text Handler */
4478/*===========================================================================*/
4479
4480void Vehicle::resetAllMessages() { m_statusTextHandler->resetAllMessages(); }
4481void Vehicle::resetErrorLevelMessages() { m_statusTextHandler->resetErrorLevelMessages(); }
4482void Vehicle::clearMessages() { m_statusTextHandler->clearMessages(); }
4483bool Vehicle::messageTypeNone() const { return m_statusTextHandler->messageTypeNone(); }
4484bool Vehicle::messageTypeNormal() const { return m_statusTextHandler->messageTypeNormal(); }
4485bool Vehicle::messageTypeWarning() const { return m_statusTextHandler->messageTypeWarning(); }
4486bool Vehicle::messageTypeError() const { return m_statusTextHandler->messageTypeError(); }
4487int Vehicle::messageCount() const { return m_statusTextHandler->messageCount(); }
4488QString Vehicle::formattedMessages() const { return m_statusTextHandler->formattedMessages(); }
4489
4490void Vehicle::_createStatusTextHandler()
4491{
4492 m_statusTextHandler = new StatusTextHandler(this);
4493 (void) connect(m_statusTextHandler, &StatusTextHandler::messageTypeChanged, this, &Vehicle::messageTypeChanged);
4494 (void) connect(m_statusTextHandler, &StatusTextHandler::messageCountChanged, this, &Vehicle::messageCountChanged);
4495 (void) connect(m_statusTextHandler, &StatusTextHandler::newFormattedMessage, this, &Vehicle::newFormattedMessage);
4496 (void) connect(m_statusTextHandler, &StatusTextHandler::textMessageReceived, this, &Vehicle::_textMessageReceived);
4497 (void) connect(m_statusTextHandler, &StatusTextHandler::newErrorMessage, this, &Vehicle::_errorMessageReceived);
4498}
4499
4500void Vehicle::_textMessageReceived(MAV_COMPONENT componentid, MAV_SEVERITY severity, QString text, QString description)
4501{
4502 // PX4 backwards compatibility: messages sent out ending with a tab are also sent as event
4503 if (px4Firmware() && text.endsWith('\t')) {
4504 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Dropping message (expected as event):" << text;
4505 return;
4506 }
4507
4508 bool skipSpoken = false;
4509 const bool ardupilotPrearm = text.startsWith(QStringLiteral("PreArm"));
4510 const bool px4Prearm = text.startsWith(QStringLiteral("preflight"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) && (severity >= MAV_SEVERITY::MAV_SEVERITY_CRITICAL);
4511 if (ardupilotPrearm || px4Prearm) {
4512 auto eventData = _events.find(componentid);
4513 if (eventData != _events.end()) {
4514 if (eventData->data()->healthAndArmingChecksSupported()) {
4515 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Dropping preflight message (expected as event):" << text;
4516 return;
4517 }
4518 }
4519
4520 // Limit repeated PreArm message to once every 10 seconds
4521 if (_noisySpokenPrearmMap.contains(text) && _noisySpokenPrearmMap.value(text).msecsTo(QTime::currentTime()) < (10 * 1000)) {
4522 skipSpoken = true;
4523 } else {
4524 (void) _noisySpokenPrearmMap.insert(text, QTime::currentTime());
4525 setPrearmError(text);
4526 }
4527 }
4528
4529 bool readAloud = false;
4530
4531 if (text.startsWith("#")) {
4532 (void) text.remove(0, 1);
4533 readAloud = true;
4534 } else if (severity <= MAV_SEVERITY::MAV_SEVERITY_NOTICE) {
4535 readAloud = true;
4536 }
4537
4538 if (readAloud && !skipSpoken) {
4539 _say(text);
4540 }
4541
4542 emit textMessageReceived(id(), componentid, severity, text, description);
4543 m_statusTextHandler->handleHTMLEscapedTextMessage(componentid, severity, text.toHtmlEscaped(), description);
4544}
4545
4546void Vehicle::_errorMessageReceived(QString message)
4547{
4548 if (_isActiveVehicle) {
4549 qgcApp()->showCriticalVehicleMessage(message);
4550 }
4551}
4552
4553/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4554/*===========================================================================*/
4555/* Signing */
4556/*===========================================================================*/
4557
4558void Vehicle::sendSetupSigning()
4559{
4560 SharedLinkInterfacePtr sharedLink = vehicleLinkManager()->primaryLink().lock();
4561 if (!sharedLink) {
4562 qCDebug(VehicleLog) << "Primary Link Gone!";
4563 return;
4564 }
4565
4566 const mavlink_channel_t channel = static_cast<mavlink_channel_t>(sharedLink->mavlinkChannel());
4567
4568 mavlink_setup_signing_t setup_signing;
4569
4570 mavlink_system_t target_system;
4571 target_system.sysid = id();
4572 target_system.compid = defaultComponentId();
4573
4574 MAVLinkSigning::createSetupSigning(channel, target_system, setup_signing);
4575
4576 mavlink_message_t msg;
4577 (void) mavlink_msg_setup_signing_encode_chan(MAVLinkProtocol::instance()->getSystemId(), MAVLinkProtocol::getComponentId(), channel, &msg, &setup_signing);
4578
4579 // Since we don't get an ack back that the message was received send twice to try to make sure it makes it to the vehicle
4580 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
4581 sendMessageOnLinkThreadSafe(sharedLink.get(), msg);
4582 }
4583}
4584
4585/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
4586/*===========================================================================*/
4587/* Image Protocol Manager */
4588/*===========================================================================*/
4589
4590void Vehicle::_createImageProtocolManager()
4591{
4592 _imageProtocolManager = new ImageProtocolManager(this);
4593 (void) connect(_imageProtocolManager, &ImageProtocolManager::flowImageIndexChanged, this, &Vehicle::flowImageIndexChanged);
4594 (void) connect(_imageProtocolManager, &ImageProtocolManager::imageReady, this, [this](const QImage &image) {
4595 qgcApp()->qgcImageProvider()->setImage(image, _systemID);
4596 });
4597}
4598
4599uint32_t Vehicle::flowImageIndex() const
4600{
4601 return (_imageProtocolManager ? _imageProtocolManager->flowImageIndex() : 0);
4602}

4609void Vehicle::_createMAVLinkLogManager()
4610{
4611 _mavlinkLogManager = new MAVLinkLogManager(this, this);
4612}
4613
4614MAVLinkLogManager *Vehicle::mavlinkLogManager() const
4615{
4616 return _mavlinkLogManager;
4617}

4619/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

4623
4624void Vehicle::_createCameraManager()
4625{
4626 if (!_cameraManager && _firmwarePlugin) {
4627 _cameraManager = _firmwarePlugin->createCameraManager(this);
4628 emit cameraManagerChanged();
4629 }
4630}
4631
4632const QVariantList &Vehicle::staticCameraList() const
4633{
4634 if (_cameraManager) {
4635 return _cameraManager->cameraList();
4636 }
4637
4638 static QVariantList emptyCameraList;
4639 return emptyCameraList;
4640}
